programme.title: Movie: Wrapped Up in Christmas
programme.desc: A mall Santa is trying to find his way after quitting his job, until he meets an unfriendly Christmas Grinch in the form of the mall manager.

programme.title: Movie: Matchmaker Christmas
programme.desc: When a woman's old boyfriend remerges at her work for the holidays, she must decide on her feelings before her coworkers’ interest is sparked.

programme.title: Movie: Random Acts of Christmas
programme.desc: Investigating random acts of Christmas around her city, a young journalist meets a competing reporter who sparks her Christmas spirit.

programme.title: Movie: A Sweet Christmas Romance
programme.desc: When food stylist Holly returns home for Christmas, she learns that Loretta, the elderly owner of her favorite childhood bakery, is retiring and has started a contest to give the bakery away.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Death of Michael Jackson
programme.desc: Revelations of what Michael Jackson's children and staff witnessed prior to his death, and an investigation into the claims that Jackson took his own life.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: George Michael's Final Days
programme.desc: George Michael's life as international super star came to a mysterious and tragic end on Christmas Eve 2016. Family and fans were shocked by his sudden death. What happened the night he died?

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Prince: The End
programme.desc: Uncovering the secret struggles the music genius faced, from Prince's early years to the final days leading up to his shocking death.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Final Days of Whitney Houston
programme.desc: New details surrounding Whitney Houston's last days and her tumultuous relationship with Bobby Brown are revealed.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Selena: Fatal Encounter
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes of Selena's red-hot career, ambitions and tragic demise. Rare interviews include her close friend and co-fashion designer, the back-up in her band, and a nurse who spoke to Selena and ger killer just before she died.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Welcome Intrusion
programme.desc: Years after a man is hailed for shooting the man who allegedly criminally harassed him and murdered his wife after breaking into their home, new technologies force the police to reassess the case. A tragic tale soon becomes even more tragic in a new way.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Within Arm's Reach
programme.desc: A man accused of killing his estranged wife insists she committed suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bad Medicine
programme.desc: A woman becomes critically ill, leaving her unable to walk. As her symptoms worsen, she gets a bone marrow test. The results reveal arsenic. Investigators now have to determine if she was poisoned by water contamination, or something far more sinister.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Stick 'em Up
programme.desc: When a bank president is found floating in a nearby lake, taped to a chair, forensic experts start piecing together the tape and discover a missing piece. It's this piece, and tips pouring in from residents, that will lead to a capture.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Badge of Betrayal
programme.desc: With no suspects or motives, investigators can't make sense of a murder when a young woman is found dead near the highway. A tiny piece of unique fibre on the victim's clothing will lead to the most unlikely killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Matrimony
programme.desc: A young woman claims to need some time away on her own. After 20 years go by, her family begins to believe they will never know what happened to her, until one day they receive a phone call that will alter everything.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Chief Evidence
programme.desc: A couple was murdered during what looked like a drug deal gone awry. But police found no drugs in the home of the victims and there were no traces of the victims' blood on the clothing of the suspects. The victim's dog eventually led police to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Bitter Pill to Swallow
programme.desc: A pregnant woman experiences severe morning sickness and suspects something is amiss.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sip of Sins
programme.desc: Faryion Wardrip seemed like the model citizen to most, but he was also a brutal serial killer who, for years, eluded police without suspicion. But smart police work and DNA from a discarded paper cup proved to be Wardrip's undoing.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Telltale Tracks
programme.desc: Police found an abandoned car on the highway and assumed the driver had been the victim of a car-jacking. When they find the victim's body, unusual marks on her body lead to her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bed of Deceit
programme.desc: When a retired police officer is found shot dead in his bed, investigators suspect suicide. But the evidence, alongside surveillance tape from a nearby bank, seems to indicate it was murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smoke in Your Eyes
programme.desc: The bodies of two young women are found in the ashes of an apartment fire, which appears to have been set deliberately.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Flower Power
programme.desc: Two different men call police to report the same murder. Apparently, neither one knew that the other had called.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Past Lives: The Madison Rutherford Case
programme.desc: The body of a wealthy American businessman is found in his rental car. When the victim's wife files a claim for $7 million of life insurance, investigators seek the help of a forensic anthropologist and uncover a chilling scheme of fraud and deceit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shopping Spree
programme.desc: A mother and her daughter leave home for a day of shopping, but never return. The little girl's body was found dumped off of a roadside, but there was no sign of her mother. Forensic science determined if the baby's mother was a suspect or a victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Cheater
programme.desc: Little did Walter Scott of the band 'Bob Kuban and the In-Men' know that their 1966 hit-single 'The Cheater' would foreshadow the events that would lead to his demise.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Vanished From the Crib
programme.desc: Baby Lisa Irwin goes missing from her crib in the middle of the night. Stolen cell phones and a disturbing debit card charge on the parent’s account only adds to the mystery.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade
programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: The Wrong Man
programme.desc: Two construction workers are brutally attacked in San Antonio, but one survives and is able to identify his assailant.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Body of Evidence
programme.desc: A small-town electrician sits on Texas death row for the murder of a 19-year-old college student, but forensic science could exonerate him.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Death, Lies and Videotape
programme.desc: The execution-style killings of a Florida nightclub owner and two aspiring models are caught on camera.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Ride to the Rescue
programme.desc: A Sacramento law student is convicted after a brutal home invasion and murder. Her cause seems lost until Joyce Ride, mother of Sally Ride, becomes intrigued with the case.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Forensics By Fire
programme.desc: Did Daniel Dougherty commit murder by arson, or did the fire science used to convict him get it wrong?

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Ferocious Ford and Fast Ferrari
programme.desc: The Gas Monkey crew turn a rat-infested '38 Ford into a cool hot rod. Richard buys football player Emmitt Smith's Mercedes, which comes with a surprise. Richard gambles $400K on a banged up Ferrari F-40.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: No Bull Bonneville
programme.desc: Once again, Richard and Aaron stall the crazy, roadtripping Aussies with Texas hospitality while the crew races to finish a 59 Bonneville they were given only 72 hrs to fix up. To get some more cash for the job, Richard picks up two mini cars from a nest.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Fastest in America: Texas vs Kentucky Pt 1
programme.desc: Teams Texas and Wyoming have been gunning for each other ever since Varni and Sherrybeth clashed in Wyoming. Tonight, they finally get their chance to battle and both teams are ready to pull out all the stops to make it to the next round $20,000 richer.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Full Throttle: Texas vs Kentucky Pt 2
programme.desc: With added scenes and bonus features: Kentucky is down but they're ready pull out a few extra tricks as their battle against team Texas rages on.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Fastest in America: Black Sheep vs. South Carolina
programme.desc: A newly formed team from South Carolina has formed under Chris Block and they're ready to battle with Brent Self and his Black Sheep Mafia. After Block's team suffers an internal struggle, the score is settled in a night of grudge racing.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Full Throttle: Texas vs Kentucky Grudge Night
programme.desc: With added scenes and bonus features: Lizzy Musi hits the streets in Aftershock to find some grudge racing. Meanwhile, Black Sheep Mafia sets out to prove to South Carolina that they're not underdogs.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Fastest in America: Black Sheep vs. South Carolina
programme.desc: A newly formed team from South Carolina has formed under Chris Block and they're ready to battle with Brent Self and his Black Sheep Mafia. After Block's team suffers an internal struggle, the score is settled in a night of grudge racing.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Full Throttle: Texas vs Kentucky Grudge Night
programme.desc: With added scenes and bonus features: Lizzy Musi hits the streets in Aftershock to find some grudge racing. Meanwhile, Black Sheep Mafia sets out to prove to South Carolina that they're not underdogs.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Gone A-Rye
programme.desc: Shiners attempt to stay off the grid as the outside world encroaches on the backwoods. Tim breaks the news about the fate of Climax Moonshine. Jeff, Mark and Lance search for a new site before rivals can grab hold of the market.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Still Life
programme.desc: Josh and Bill find themselves with no still, no home base and no shine. Mark and Digger enlist a whiskey legend to find out why their first run went awry. Mark, Jeff and Lance undertake construction on an ambitious still site.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Rain or Shine
programme.desc: Weeks into moonshine season, Josh and Bill race to finish their still site and make their first run. Intruders interrupt Mark and Digger's rye test. A deadly disaster leaves Tim rattled and rethinking his plans to expand.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Scotch on the Rocks
programme.desc: It's one step forward and two steps back for Josh and Bill as they near the completion of their bunker. After losing a batch of mash, Jeff, Mark and Lance are $6000 in the hole as they begin making their highland scotch.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Six Feet Undercover
programme.desc: With a revolutionary still pot design and the help of Jim Tom, Mark and Digger have crafted 150 gallons of brandy. Now the duo must get their shine into the hands of their waiting customers.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Out on a Limb
programme.desc: In North Carolina a behemoth threatens to undo months of construction for Josh and Bill. A nocturnal prowler threatens Patti and David's clandestine operation and battle lines are drawn in Kentucky as Chico and Tyler clash over creative differences.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Trouble Brewing
programme.desc: With summer winding down, shiners are doubling their efforts to turn a quick profit. Tim Smith traverses the Atlantic on his quest to dominate the international shine market, but his pitch could be lost in translation.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Caved In
programme.desc: After coming to blows with Bill, Josh fears he may have finally gone too far. Patti and David aim to make up for lost time with a scorching new brew, but alarm bells have them running for the hills.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Cherry Bounce
programme.desc: It's the final weeks of summer and shiners are putting it all on the line. Tim must create a way to fill a massive international order and its judgment day in Virginia as Tickle puts on a brave face for court.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Shine 'Til You Drop
programme.desc: The stakes get higher as shine season nears its end. Mark and Digger leave disaster behind for a new still site as Patti and David's jalapeno whiskey drives them to sell in unfamiliar territory.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Still Regretting
programme.desc: Josh is down his right hand and his right hand man. Snags at the distillery have production at a halt and Tim's future in jeopardy. Chico and Sandra set out on horseback for some mountain shining. Patti and David rush to run before hunting season begins.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Virgin Whiskey
programme.desc: Chico and Sandra are anxious to get back in the saddle and make their first run. Tim's behemoth tank might not be the ticket to fulfilling the Poland order after all. With Jim Tom by his side, Josh churns out a family heritage spirit.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way: Never Stop Fighting
programme.desc: Sumit is backed into a corner, Kenny and Armando receive some surprising news and Ari's life takes an unexpected turn. Deavan's wedding day doesn't go how she imagined it would and Brittany makes a dramatic choice for love.

programme.desc: Steph makes an attempt to bond with Liz. Justina and her sisters fight off Annette's wedding dress demands. Emily gives Shekeb an ultimatum after being humiliated by Laila again.

programme.title: Unpolished: Meet the Martones
programme.desc: The Martones are a loud, fun-loving Italian family from Long Island. Sisters Lexi, a talented nail artist, and Bria, a hair colourist/makeup artist, run Salon Martone while juggling family dynamics, over the top clients, and their own relationships.

programme.title: Unpolished: All That Glitters
programme.desc: Bria's engagement dreams with Matthew turn into a nightmare at her party. Then, she has to collaborate with Lexi on an important client who has a unique request for a music video. Lexi's feelings about Bria's fiancé may drive them apart.

programme.desc: Comora's search for a gown gets a lot glitzier with the arrival of her consultant, talk-show host Kelly Ripa.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Worth the Wait
programme.desc: Taryn is a young bride who can't wait to buy a wedding dress. Denise has returned to the salon after four years to try on her wedding dress.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: I'm a Legacy
programme.desc: Joelle tries on her mother's 1987 Kleinfeld dress, but is not sure if she is ready to walk down the aisle '80s style. Randy and Antonella know it's going to be a rough appointment when bride LeAnne declares she's the ultimate anti-bride!

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Randy's Most Memorable Appointments: I AM Bride-yonce
programme.desc: Bride Lauren loves dressing sexy, but she also wants a gown that will still feel bridal. Ali wants to look like Beyoncé on her big day, so she'll need a sexy gown with tons of sparkle. Blair bought a very sexy dress and hopes her grandmother approves.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: A Little Help From Her Friends
programme.desc: Snarky comments from Tamlyn's mom are keeping this bride down in the dumps and hiding out in the dressing room.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Duelling Divas
programme.desc: A bride and her mother each struggle with playing second fiddle, while a young preacher's daughter gets a lesson in modesty from her granny.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Country Girls Gone Wild
programme.desc: Angaleena struggles to make her voice heard as she wrangles her large and opinionated posse, while Megan continues her struggle to define her trademark 'Southern Chic.'

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Bridal Floor Bullies
programme.desc: One Southern bride's traditional family wants to crush her dreams of a form-fitting, modern gown.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Roy and Ben
programme.desc: Ben and Roy show off their frugal lifestyles. Ben throws a party on a four dollar budget and Roy shows how he freezes his assets.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Feast or Famine
programme.desc: Cooking instructor Ron Maestri shows us how to cook for lobster taste on a tunafish budget. Rocker Goldy Locks converted an abandoned hospital into her home, for just the fraction of the price.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Kate
programme.desc: Dumpster diver Kate takes us through her super cheap lifestyle in New York City.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: All Wrapped Up
programme.desc: Todd Moriarty is obsessed with preserving the value of his assets. In an effort to keep his home looking like new, he wraps all of his possessions - from his car to his bathroom, in plastic wrap.

programme.title: Long Lost Family: Born Together, Stay Together
programme.desc: Weeding through rumours for 15 years, a woman is determined to uncover the truth of her biological mother, only to find many more unexpected family secrets. Identical twin sisters search for their biological mother, unsure if she's even alive.

programme.title: Long Lost Family: If You Bring Your Baby Home, You Can't Come Home
programme.desc: A man seeking redemption from his troubled past longs to reunite with the grown son he only got to hold for a few minutes as a baby. 46 years after placing her daughter for adoption, a woman still carries the feeling of guilt for being an unwed mother.

programme.title: Long Lost Family: A Slamming Door
programme.desc: Lisa helps a man who longs to discover his biological roots, but fears rejection from his unknown family. Chris helps a woman deal with guilt over the effects her birth may have had the life of her then 14-year-old mother.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: A Change is A-Comin'
programme.desc: Theresa needs a big change and suggests the unthinkable, and decides she wants to change her signature hairdo. After experimenting with some wigs, she decides to take the plunge. Then, Theresa helps connect Spirit with a young woman with her father.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: The Juice Is Loose
programme.desc: Always on the hunt to lose a few pounds, Theresa buys a juicer and she and Larry bet on how much weight she can lose in a week. Plus, Theresa connects a man with his brother whose death has haunted him for decades.

programme.title: Movie: The Longest Yard

programme.title: Movie: Get Hard
programme.desc: When a millionaire is convicted of fraud, he's given 30 days to get his affairs in order before doing time in San Quentin. Terrified of what prison life has in store for him, he hires his black friend to prep him for the experience.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Kelsie and Brandon
programme.desc: Kelsie is deeply infatuated with online love Brandon, but his reluctance to meet up over the years has Kelsie reaching out to Nev and Max.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Oceanna and Nelly
programme.desc: Nev and Slick Woods investigate the mystery of Oceanna and her enigmatic, online stalker, Nelly. When Oceanna’s ex-girlfriend Kira becomes involved though, the team are left wondering who is a victim and who is the perpetrator.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Sparkayla and Maritha

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Antoinette and Albert
programme.desc: When Antoinette meets a young rapper, the cyber attraction turns serious. After a year of talking on the phone and texting countless emoticons, Antoinette wants to take things to the next level.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Miracle and Javonni

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Ramona and Paola
programme.desc: Ramon's one shining glimmer of happiness is Paola, a girl he met on Facebook and established an exclusive online relationship with.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Jasmine and Mike
programme.desc: Jasmine's been texting with Mike for two years and thinks he'd be a great dad to her son.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Truth and Ray'Quan
programme.desc: L.A. fashion designer Truth is hot for his online crush Ray'Quan despite the fact he's in a relationship IRL.

programme.title: Movie: Catfish
programme.desc: A filmmaker follows the life of his brother, a New York photographer, and becomes intertwined in an online intrigue of love and deception.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Red and Jalissa
programme.desc: For the last six years, Red's been talking to Jalissa and her group of celebrity besties. Hot on the trail to meet Jalissa in LA, Nev and Kamie help Red uncover a truth that might turn her Hollywood love story into a tragedy.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Danny and Rosa
programme.desc: Danny is intent on building a family with his beautiful online love, despite her violent past. When he enlists Nev and Max to help him finally meet her in person, they soon discover she may have ties to a former Catfish.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Dejay, Malik and Josiah
programme.desc: Nev and Max get two catfish for the price of one when they discover that Dejay and Malik are being played by the same guy. Sparks fly as they discover just how explosive a love triangle can be.

programme.desc: The guys act frosty while working the ice cream counter, then take Joe's dogs for a romp in the park with help from some strangers. Later, tonight's loser watches his blood boil while performing with a gospel choir.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stare Master
programme.desc: The guys play a game of copycat at the park while babysitting kids, and then hit the supermarket for a game of catch and release.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: X Man
programme.desc: The guys compete in their first four-way challenge. Later, see what happens when they try to lead a kid's art class, and which loser fails so badly that he's hit with an on-the-spot punishment that leaves him seeing red.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Medium, Well Done
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Q, and Joe pose as TV execs pitching insane shows, and tonight's big loser undergoes a psychic reading that puts his real life on the wrong track.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Wrong Playwright
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr, and Q hit the supermarket to mess with shoppers in an epic game of hide-and-sneak. Then, the guys draw straws at a BBQ joint, and tonight's loser gets a bad case of stage fright while giving the performance of his life.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Takes the Cake
programme.desc: Find out if any of the Jokers are avid skiers, and how the maître d' helped when seating patrons. Also, learn why Joe had a hard time escaping the giant cake.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Drum and Drummer
programme.desc: So many shoppers in the candy aisle during 'Star Struck'. The celeb that was on set while the guys filmed 'Brain Games'.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Tied and Feathered
programme.desc: The parts of Out of Remote Control that annoyed people more than any challenge to date. Why the crew was emotionally scarred after Debate and Switch.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stuffed Turkey
programme.desc: The amount of times Joe showed his butt on the show. Why the volunteers were turned away for Tool Bag.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Blind Justice
programme.desc: Find out why the Jokers killed the idea of Joe going shirtless in the boxing ring, and which of the Jokers loves dancing but is no good at it.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Laundry Day
programme.desc: The guys look for partners in crime at a supermarket and throw caution to the wind as helpless romantics. Plus, tonight’s loser has a serious wardrobe malfunction.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: When Cows Attack
programme.desc: The Raney family arrives at a homestead threatened by heat, coyotes and even cows. Yes, cows. Disaster strikes when Marty attempts to protect livestock with a massive build, and the race is on to finish the project before father Paul must leave for work.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: The Bears and the Bees
programme.desc: The Raney family arrives at a homestead with a bee-obsessed owner unintentionally attracting bears with his hives. Marty bush-engineers a windmill to pump water to a new bathhouse, but the dangerous North Carolina wind threatens progress.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Ozark Mountain Misery
programme.desc: The Raney family goes to the Ozarks, where Marty spent his childhood homesteading, and discovers a malnourished couple and a mouldy cabin that's making them sick. Massive electric storms hit, but the homestead must be built before Mother Nature wins.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Methane Meltdown
programme.desc: The Raneys have a challenge on their hands as they try to restore a couple's failed homestead in Ohio. Marty's only hope is an old gas well, which if he can get working, can breathe life back into the homestead.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Survival Shelter: Fight Against the Flames
programme.desc: Raging California wildfires force the Raneys to give a masterclass on how to rebuild from scratch. Later, the Raneys use all new ingenuity to build a safe and structured space for a family's vulnerable livestock and cabin on the verge of collapse.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off The Deep End XL: For the Love of Paradise
programme.desc: In Florida, the crew is on a mission to transform a family's outdoor space into a Costa Rican-inspired jungle backyard. Later, Lucas builds a Mediterranean-inspired mini resort with a Caribbean twist for a client's wedding anniversary.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Survival Shelter: Fight Against the Flames
programme.desc: Raging California wildfires force the Raneys to give a masterclass on how to rebuild from scratch. Later, the Raneys use all new ingenuity to build a safe and structured space for a family's vulnerable livestock and cabin on the verge of collapse.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off The Deep End XL: Giant Grotto and Tranquil Temple
programme.desc: Lucas is challenged with two builds for two very different clients. One wants a giant grotto, complete with a waterfall, while the other wants a quiet backyard retreat.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Green With Envy
programme.desc: Lucas and the crew have their work cut out for them as a client's demands leave him reluctant. A Caribbean destination that includes green rocks and a sand bottom salt-water pool is the client's request.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Growing Pains
programme.desc: A couple hires Lucas to take their outdated pool and remodel so it's safe for their baby boy. The hope is that the dull patio pool will be transformed into a stunning natural atrium.

programme.title: Yukon Men: The Black Wolf
programme.desc: A wolf pack continues to encroach. Charlie's only option is to pursue the pack leader. Joey deals with consequences of Alaska's unusually warm winter and turns to his dad for help. Nations thinks the Moore's mushing team is running with the wrong leader.

programme.title: Yukon Men: On Thin Ice
programme.desc: Stan has the dangerous task of building an ice road across the Yukon River. Joe and Bob take their chances to embark on a perilous caribou hunt. Charlie confronts Nations about his trapline neglect. Pat and Courtney are faced with an alarming discovery.

programme.title: Yukon Men: Gut Check
programme.desc: The pressure is on Nations when the Moores head out for the first major dog sled race of the season. Stan faces a hard decision when one of his dogs falls ill. Charlie has had enough once he sees the state of the trapline he handed over to Nations.

programme.title: Yukon Men: Tanana's Test
programme.desc: Stan and Pat race to prepare Tanana to be a checkpoint for the Iditarod dog sled race. Charlie and Bob hunt a grizzly that has been terrorizing a miner's camp. Joe trains his new dog, hoping to turn him into a hunting partner.

programme.title: Yukon Men: Life on the Line
programme.desc: Nations and Charlie have a confrontation over rights to a family trapline. Stan and Kathleen try to upgrade Tozi cabin, but get more than they bargained for. The Moore's kennel is on the line as Courtney and Nations race in the Yukon River Championship.

programme.title: Yukon Men: Blood on Their Hands
programme.desc: After a poor trapping season, Charlie Wright teams up with Stan Zuray in a last-ditch effort to catch beaver. Stan and Joe Zuray discover a large predator has been stealing from their trapline. James Roberts teaches his two sons the importance of hunting.

programme.title: Yukon Men: All In
programme.desc: Unseasonably thin ice prevents villagers from reaching valuable hunting grounds, forcing Stan and Charlie to carve a new path through the rugged Alaskan wilderness in search of food. Desperate to provide for his family, James takes a huge risk.

programme.title: Yukon Men: Breaking Point
programme.desc: The Yukon River breaks up earlier than ever. Despite dangerous conditions, Joey crosses the river to hunt geese. Stan and Bob prepare the village for imminent flooding due to the break up, when they realize someone is stuck.

programme.title: Yukon Men: The Road
programme.desc: Villagers face a new threat, as outsiders descend on sacred hunting grounds. Charlie and James track a moose and make a disturbing discovery. Stan races to find a new source of fresh water after a vital spring dries up.

programme.title: Yukon Men: Bloodlines
programme.desc: Charlie clears trail along a treacherous stretch of the Yukon, with help from his daughter's new boyfriend. Chris and Jessi hatch a plan to hunt with homemade weapons. Pat's wife Lorene is rushed to a hospital in Fairbanks for emergency surgery.

programme.title: Movie: Death at a Funeral
programme.desc: Aaron's father's funeral turns into chaos when his extended family arrives. An uncle complains about his daughter's boyfriend, a cousin inadvertently gives her fiancé LSD, and family secrets are revealed.

programme.title: Movie: Lottery Ticket
programme.desc: A young man must survive a long weekend after his neighbours in the projects learn that he has a winning lottery ticket.

programme.title: Movie: Blue Streak
programme.desc: A jewel thief is released from jail and sets out to find his hidden loot. However, when he returns to his hiding spot he finds the area has been turned into a police station and his only shot of recovering the diamonds is to impersonate a detective.

programme.title: Martin: Workin' Day and Night
programme.desc: Stan, Tommy and Cole convince Martin that Gina controls his life. To prove them wrong, he starts working double shifts at the radio station, which is exactly what Gina didn't want.

programme.title: Martin: Control
programme.desc: When Gina accidentally throws out Martin's basketball tickets, she tries to get replacement tickets from Sheneneh.

programme.title: Martin: You've Got a Friend
programme.desc: A jealous Martin scares away Gina's new male friend, but he regrets his actions when Gina forces him to go shopping with her.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: Terry Unmarried
programme.desc: Cleveland learns that Donna never legally divorced her ex-husband, so she and Cleveland are not legally married. Then, Cleveland discovers that his best friend Terry is gay and has been dating a guy named Paul.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: The Blue, the Gray and the Brown
programme.desc: After Cleveland fights to save the town's drive-in, his efforts to preserve the town's history are noticed by the Stoolbend Preservation Society, which invites him to attend a private dinner party.

programme.title: Martin: To Kill a Talking Bird
programme.desc: An accident happens when Martin and Gina are caring for Mama Payne's beloved parrot.

programme.title: Martin: Fat Like Dat
programme.desc: When Gina convinces Martin that he's gaining weight, he and the guys take dieting and exercise to the extreme.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Hi-Ho Silver
programme.desc: Will and Carlton suspect the neighbours of stealing the family's heirloom silverware.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: The Butler Did It
programme.desc: Will and the children rent the house out to a production company for a music video shoot.

programme.title: The Parkers: Reunited
programme.desc: Nikki moves in with Kim and throws her weight around, causing tension between them.

programme.title: The Parkers: J.C. Bowl
programme.desc: Nikki helps Professor Oglevee assemble a winning team so he can beat his long-time rival.

programme.title: The Parkers: Whassup With Heyyy?
programme.desc: T, Kim and Nikki decide to try making money by selling T-shirts with a catchy slogan.

programme.title: The Parkers: Scary Kim
programme.desc: A mysterious prankster turns Kim's Halloween birthday bash into the ultimate fright fest.

programme.title: House of Payne: Expectations
programme.desc: CJ, Janine and their dates go to a party, but revelations about Janine's pregnancy cause problems. Curtis befriends the cable guy when his television fades out.

programme.title: House of Payne: Cheers
programme.desc: Malik tries out for the cheerleading squad so that he can win a bet with Kevin and get the finest girl in school's number.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Something for Nothing
programme.desc: Will wins $1,000 at a charity fund raiser and refuses to donate it back to charity.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: The Christmas Show
programme.desc: A stranger robs the Banks family after Will generously invites him into their cabin.

programme.title: Black-ish: Johnson & Johnson
programme.desc: Dre's sister, Rhonda, is getting married to her girlfriend, Sharon, and the upcoming nuptials lead to a conversation on tradition. Dre finds out that Bow is against the patriarchal convention of taking the man's last name.

programme.title: Black-ish: The Johnson Show
programme.desc: Dre has always strived to mirror his life after the model families he grew up watching on TV. When news spreads that Stevens & Lido is going through layoffs, Dre panics that his family's reputation will be tarnished if he loses his job.

programme.title: Martin: Hollywood Swinging (Part 1)
programme.desc: After Gina and Pam get promotions, Martin realizes his job is going nowhere.

programme.title: Martin: Hollywood Swinging (Part 2)
programme.desc: In Los Angeles, Martin takes steps to ensure that he gets on Varnel Hill's talk show.

programme.title: Martin: Thanks for Nothing
programme.desc: Thanksgiving gets interesting when Martin's relatives and Gina's parents come to dinner.

programme.title: Martin: Whoop There It Ain't
programme.desc: Pam challenges Gina and Martin to see if they can abstain from having sex for two weeks.

programme.title: The Parkers: Election 2000
programme.desc: Kim and Nikki become political rivals when both run for president of the student-body.

programme.title: The Parkers: Heir Today, Gone Tomorrow
programme.desc: For a creative-writing project, Kim imagines her family as the Ewings from 'Dallas.'

programme.title: The Parkers: Turkey Day Blues
programme.desc: The gang winds up in a homeless shelter on Thanksgiving Day after Nikki and Kim argue.

programme.title: Meet the Browns: Meet London and the Competition
programme.desc: Brown interviews for prospects for a handyman position and hires Jesus (who's studying to be a lawyer). Meanwhile, Sasha agrees to come and work as a nurse.

programme.title: Meet the Browns: Meet the Dependents and the Divas
programme.desc: Carmen asks Sasha and Will to be foster parents, but they hesitate because they're so busy. Cora is willing to help by letting the kids stay at the Brown house. Meanwhile, London and Miss Daisy are interviewed by a local TV show, but it turns into a duel.

programme.title: Meet the Browns: Meet Your Family
programme.desc: Brown becomes tired of the chaos and arranges a surprise 'Family Day' to occupy them all only to create more family drama.

programme.title: Meet the Browns: Meet Your Maker

programme.desc: After the body of a missing navy commander is found, Vance orders Gibbs and the team to work with former FBI Agent Fornell. Also, Bishop and Torres interview a convicted investment advisor, when the victim is linked to his highly publicized trial.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: One Dead Kid, a Notebook and a Lot of Maybes
programme.desc: Intelligence sets out to find a missing teenaged boy who they believe poses a serious threat to the students at his wealthy school after finding disturbing drawings in his notebook.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Forget My Name
programme.desc: When Intelligence follows up on a tip Antonio and Halstead received from a reliable informant about an upcoming drug trade, the team is shocked to discover the mutilated body of a man.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Never Forget I Love You
programme.desc: When the decapitated body of a woman found in Lake Michigan is connected to Voight's social circle, Lindsay fears his relationship with the group may hinder his ability to approach the case objectively.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Now I'm God
programme.desc: A doctor with personal connections to Voight is under investigation when four of his patients are committed to Chicago Med after an overdose of chemo.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Knocked the Family Right Out
programme.desc: After a luxury condo is robbed, the team is shocked to learn that not only was the family fast asleep when the crime occurred, but their teenaged daughter was violated during the invasion as well.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Looking Out for Stateville
programme.desc: Voight convinces Deputy Crowley to bring in his former cellmate, Eddie, as a CI for the unit in order to help bring down a big-time cocaine supplier and his local dealers.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Hit Me
programme.desc: Lindsay goes undercover in an effort to track down a rogue police officer targeting women leaving a local casino.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Flipped
programme.desc: A young rap artist is killed while leaving a radio station. Detectives question the only witness at the scene, who reveals he is an undercover cop whose task force specializes in crimes within the rap world.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Brother's Keeper
programme.desc: In a 'ripped from the headlines' story, a televangelist's wife is found murdered, and his secret sessions with a hustler may have led to her murder. While visiting his ailing mother in the hospital, Det. Goren runs into his long lost brother.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Thirty
programme.desc: When a journalist realizes he has been poisoned, he rushes to his old friend, Det. Logan. Lemle is convinced it traces back to a story he's working on, but all leads turn up clean.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly Conspiracy
programme.desc: Jack Jessee was a family man who didn't seem to have an enemy in the world, up until the night he was killed. The case went cold but a relentless detective was determined to catch Jack's killer.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Confession
programme.desc: Soon after Angie Dodge was murdered, Christopher Tapp admitted he was one of her killers. Police captured his confession on videotape so why would the victim's mom, who once campaigned to put Tapp in prison fight to free him.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Poison
programme.desc: Larry McNabney had a thriving career and a wife he adored. Then he vanished. It was a mystery as twisted as they come. At its center: three lives tangled together in a love triangle, including one of them who was hiding a secret identity.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Night Lynsie Disappeared
programme.desc: It was a mystery that stumped investigators for years. A college student disappeared after a night out clubbing. Her mother thought she was at a sleepover with friends and it took an eagle-eyed detective to find the truth buried in a pile of lies.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Secrets in the Mist
programme.desc: A young mom, married to her high school sweetheart, vanishes. Did she leave her family to start a new life or was there another reason for her disappearance? Decades later her grown son faced a dark truth at the core of this mystery.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Secrets in the Snow
programme.desc: She was a dancer who married a dashing photographer. They seemed to have the picture-perfect life until the bone-chilling night she disappeared. In a case filled with twists, could the victim help solve her own murder?

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Texas Crime Spree
programme.desc: A tragic speedboat crash; a treasure hunter's find. Also: A paroled bank robber returns to a life of crime.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Slain Sammy

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries
programme.desc: A clumsy bank robber; an underground drug route between Mexico and the U. S.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Casino Cowboy
programme.desc: A purportedly haunted ranch in Texas; an abandoned car and its missing driver; claims of corruption at a California prison. Also: a doctor raises suspicions.

programme.title: Movie: Mamma Mia! Here We Go Again

programme.title: The Simpsons: Principal Charming

programme.title: The Simpsons: Sweet Seymour Skinner's Badass Song

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart's Girlfriend

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer Badman

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror VI

programme.title: The Simpsons: Much Apu About Nothing

programme.title: The Simpsons: Dark Knight Court

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: The Gang Tends Bar

programme.title: Movie: Where's the Money?

programme.title: Movie: Sisters

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Run Home Roscoe!
programme.desc: Roscoe refuses to go outside the family's property and has several fear issues. Can Cesar teach Roscoe to overcome his fears and go on a walk?

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Heavy Metal Miles
programme.desc: Former Guns N' Roses and current Velvet Revolver drummer Matt Sorum's tenacious 10-month-old French bulldog Miles goes crazy at the sight of another dog. Will Cesar's help have Miles drumming to a different beat?

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Mastiff Mayhem
programme.desc: A woman must ask her dog permission to sit down; a mastiff scares guests; a Tibetan terrier screeches on walks.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Mad Dogs
programme.desc: Memphis has insatiable appetite eating several foreign objects, which required surgery twice.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Revved-Up Harley
programme.desc: Memphis, a Weimaraner with an insatiable appetite, needs to learn how to eat healthier by not eating everything in sight! Harley is an uncontrollable Yellow lab who loves to hump and dig up the lawn. Cesar hopes he can calm this revved up Harley!

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Hook, Feline and Sinker
programme.desc: From gimpy goats to belligerent bulls, families all around are relying on Pol Veterinary Service to take care of their animals this summer.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Knights of the Round Stable
programme.desc: Over at the Michigan Renaissance Festival, Dr. Pol takes a look at the hooves of a limping horse named Maverick, a jousting giant scheduled to compete at that day's tournament.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Squeal of Fortune
programme.desc: It's Dr. Pols birthday, but before the celebrations can begin, there's a bevy of cases for the Pol Veterinary staff.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: One Hot Llama
programme.desc: The leaves have changed and the first hints of winter appear in central Michigan. Dr. Pol and the PVS crew are still hard at work servicing the farms and small animal owners of Isabella County and the surrounding areas.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Pluto's Evil Twin
programme.desc: After NASA's New Horizons spacecraft flies by Pluto, it encounters a strange alien world that shuts down the probe's computers, and experts investigate if this mysterious object is an alien spacecraft hiding at the edge of our solar system.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Secrets of the Alien Signals
programme.desc: NASA begins a strange experiment to communicate with dolphins, and experts investigate if it's a prelude to making alien contact. However, some fear that such a discovery could have apocalyptic consequences.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: The Black Hole Next Door
programme.desc: When astronomers discover a rogue black hole speeding through the Milky Way, they investigate how much danger this cosmic monster poses to Earth, and what would happen if it ever entered our solar system.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Stonehenge on Mars
programme.desc: When NASA spots a something on Mars that resembles Stonehenge, they investigate what could have made this strange structure. Scientists discover a mysterious hole in Saturn's rings. An ancient tribe claims contact with alien visitors.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Stars: Cosmic Killers
programme.desc: Astronomers have uncovered deadly stars with the power to destroy on a cosmic scale, but these murderous entities may also hold the key to life itself; using cutting-edge technology, experts unravel the mysterious behavior of these galactic monsters.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Death of the Last Stars
programme.desc: Our universe's stars are dying off faster than new ones are born, and using the latest technology, experts investigate the secrets of the last stars of the cosmos and what this stellar apocalypse means for life on earth.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Stars That Kill
programme.desc: The universe is home to real-life Death Stars that could destroy planet Earth. The latest science reveals the terrifying secrets of NASA's six deadliest: vampire stars, supernovas that can vaporize a planet, and unpredictable stars gone rogue.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: When Supernovas Strike
programme.desc: Supernovas are the violent death of giant stars, and new discoveries reveal that these cataclysmic events create the elements that are essential to all life in the universe.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Death of the Last Stars
programme.desc: Our universe's stars are dying off faster than new ones are born, and using the latest technology, experts investigate the secrets of the last stars of the cosmos and what this stellar apocalypse means for life on earth.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Secret World of Nebulas
programme.desc: Nebulas are the strange structures of cosmic gas and dust where stars are born and die, and new discoveries reveal the secrets of these mysterious places.

programme.title: Sinkholes: Swallowed Alive: Pit of Doom NYC
programme.desc: When a sinkhole suddenly sucks a man through a Brooklyn crosswalk, engineers use the latest cutting-edge tech in a race to fix the devastating damage and prevent more deadly sinkholes from striking.

programme.title: Sinkholes: Swallowed Alive: Nightmare in the Bayou
programme.desc: When a dangerous sinkhole suddenly spawns in a Louisiana bayou, engineers race to use cutting-edge technology to fix the devastation and prevent more deadly sinkholes from striking.

programme.title: Sinkholes: Swallowed Alive: Man-Eating Monster
programme.desc: When a deadly man-eating sinkhole consumes a Florida house, engineers race to use cutting-edge technology to fix the devastating damage and prevent more deadly sinkholes from striking.

programme.title: Sinkholes: Swallowed Alive: Gotham's Gates of Hell
programme.desc: When swarms of sinkholes strike New York City, engineers race to use cutting-edge technology to fix the devastation and prevent these hellish pits from threatening more of the Big Apple.

programme.title: Sinkholes: Swallowed Alive: Wrath of the Jersey Devil
programme.desc: When a devastating sinkhole tears through a family's property in New Jersey, engineers use the latest cutting-edge tech in a race to fix the devastating damage and prevent more sinkholes.

programme.title: Sinkholes: Swallowed Alive: Florida Hell Hole
programme.desc: When a sinkhole suddenly forms beneath a Florida resort, engineers race to use cutting-edge technology to fix the devastating damage and prevent more deadly sinkholes from striking.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Mystery of the Lost Labyrinth
programme.desc: A strange, centuries-old labyrinth built into an abandoned quarry was built by an eccentric millionaire, and no one knows why; but now, a new excavation into this mysterious 9,000-foot tunnel system might finally reveal its dark secrets.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Conspiracy in the Buried City
programme.desc: Residents devised an ingenious trick to keep the location of buried ancient city hidden five stories underground secret from invaders; experts reveal what it was, and using the latest tech, they reveal the truth behind this strange place.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Treasures of the Lost Mine
programme.desc: Caverns hidden deep inside a remote mountain are home to a precious mineral found nowhere else on earth, and experts and treasure hunters use cutting-edge technology to follow rumours of a mysterious long-lost mine in search of a payday.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Cave of the Body Snatchers
programme.desc: An eerie system of underground vaults in Scotland was once the hideout for thieves who stole newly-buried bodies and sold them; today, experts are excavating these rubble-filled caves to reveal the secrets of what these bandits left behind.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Curse of Cannibal Caves
programme.desc: A mysterious cave system is home to some of the oldest human remains ever discovered, and today, the explorers and researchers investigating this site are uncovering shocking evidence of cannibalism among its Ice Age denizens.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Secrets of the Terror Tunnels
programme.desc: A vast system of tunnels built almost three thousand years ago was the site of the greatest battles of antiquity, and these disorienting passages could be the deadliest weapon in war. Experts reveal what made this underground world so terrifying.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Screaming Oaks
programme.desc: An army vet goes out of his way to make his neighbors feel welcome, but when a child's birthday gift goes missing; it only takes 37 days for the friendships to end in a killing spree.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Hysteria Lane
programme.desc: A couple who tragically lost their son are thrilled when a family with two boys moves in across the street. But the relationship soon sours, engulfing all of them in conflict, accusation, and finally a deadly shooting.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Jeffrey MacDonald: The Accused
programme.desc: An army surgeon, Jeffrey MacDonald, is the lone survivor of a brutal 1970 home invasion that claims the lives of his wife and daughters. But authorities doubt his story of murderous hippies and believe MacDonald is the culprit.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Murder at Sea
programme.desc: The small fishing town of Craig, Alaska is stunned when a premiere fishing boat explodes into flames just off shore. After fighting the flames, state troopers discover the remains of a young family and few clues as to could have set the ship blaze.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Oklahoma Horror Story
programme.desc: Just before Thanksgiving in Oklahoma City, a husband and wife are at home when two masked gunmen allegedly ambush them and kill the husband. With few leads, police use ballistics, forensics and neighborhood gossip to solve this cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Murder in Ypsilanti: Keith Morrison Investigates
programme.desc: When a young Michigan mother vanishes without a trace, her family, friends and detectives begin a desperate search, but she's never found. Twenty-five years later, a murder leads a reporter to investigate the old case, revealing secrets, old and new.

programme.title: Terror in the Pines
programme.desc: In the span of just two days in Eastern Oregon in 2009, house painter Greg Cook murdered a mother of two and two of her friends. Fleeing to Washington after the killings, Cook then sets his sights on another woman who innocently opens her home to him.

programme.title: Murder in Ypsilanti: Keith Morrison Investigates
programme.desc: When a young Michigan mother vanishes without a trace, her family, friends and detectives begin a desperate search, but she's never found. Twenty-five years later, a murder leads a reporter to investigate the old case, revealing secrets, old and new.

programme.title: Terror in the Pines
programme.desc: In the span of just two days in Eastern Oregon in 2009, house painter Greg Cook murdered a mother of two and two of her friends. Fleeing to Washington after the killings, Cook then sets his sights on another woman who innocently opens her home to him.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Murder at Sea
programme.desc: The small fishing town of Craig, Alaska is stunned when a premiere fishing boat explodes into flames just off shore. After fighting the flames, state troopers discover the remains of a young family and few clues as to could have set the ship blaze.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: TV Dreams Cut Short
programme.desc: Two young women who dream of big success as television anchors are just embarking on their careers when their plans come to a violent end. They are murdered in their own apartments and there are no signs of forced entry.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Innocence Interrupted
programme.desc: The murders of a teenage boy who never returns home from school and a teenage girl who is ambushed as she sits in a car with friends devastate their communities.

programme.title: True Conviction: The Devil in Dallas
programme.desc: A woman and her 5-year-old son are brutally murdered in a field outside Dallas. A critical piece of evidence found at the scene sends one detective on a 20-year-long hunt for the killer.

programme.title: True Conviction: The Witching Hour
programme.desc: A late-night run-in results in the horrific murder of a young Birmingham woman, creating panic throughout the city. A man who claims to have mystical visions helps to guide detectives to her killer.

programme.title: True Conviction: Deception in the Desert
programme.desc: An unidentified young woman is found brutally murdered in the desert on Christmas Eve.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Hell's Angel
programme.desc: When lonely teen Meagan Grunwald meets handsome 26-year-old felon Angel Garcia, it's love at first sight. But their whirlwind romance spirals into a hurricane of passion that leaves innocence destroyed and a trail of death and devastation in its path.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Therapy on Ice
programme.desc: When violin prodigy Lia Tricomo seeks the help of therapist John Alkins, they connect over a shared love of music. When John finds it impossible to resist his troubled patient, the consequences of indulging his forbidden passion will prove deadly.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Be My Savior
programme.desc: A teenage girl forbidden by her parents to date is swept off her feet by an older man. They vow to keep their whirlwind romance secret at all costs but when an unplanned pregnancy threatens to derail their plans, they take drastic action.

programme.title: Betrayed: Little Shop of Horrors
programme.desc: Bright aspiring architect Claudette Ficik, 19, charms every young man she meets, from coworkers at the pet store to classmates. When her body turns up in an Atlanta area river, a shocking secret is revealed: she was pregnant.

programme.title: Betrayed: Blood in the Water
programme.desc: Cathy Stroup is a no-nonsense Irish mom who knows what her family needs to survive. But the question is- how will she survive them?

programme.title: Betrayed: A Bitter Pill
programme.desc: Newlywed pharmaceutical rep Debbie Ashley turns up dead in her car trunk in a mystery ensnaring her ex-husbands, a doting coworker, her daughter's shadowy boyfriend, and her respected executive husband.

programme.title: Betrayed: Beware the Au Pair
programme.desc: When Tara Lynn Grant, a 34-year-old mother of two goes missing, police can find no trace of her until a gruesome discovery turns the case into a statewide manhunt.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Firepower
programme.desc: In this action packed episode we see the secret device that will tear apart terrorist bombs; the new squad weapon that will get you out of an ambush; the latest surface to air missile and the US Army's latest sniper rifle.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Hard Target
programme.desc: FutureWeapons tests inflatable armour, the revolutionary shoulder fired grenades that double the range of weapons, the latest generation of the A10 Thunderbolt ground attack planes and the assault rifle round that stays supersonic out to 1200 yards.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Kill Zone
programme.desc: Travel to California to witness the birth of a revolution in air warfare pushing science and technology to the limits, an unmanned bomber that can take-off and land on aircraft carriers.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Fury
programme.desc: On June 28, 1914, the assassination of an obscure Austrian archduke in Sarajevo triggers the most disastrous conflict the world has ever known. Germany becomes an enemy to France, invades Belgium and, in September, arrives at the gates of Paris.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Fear
programme.desc: The French Army stops the German advance at the battle of the Marne while the Germans halt the Russians at the Tannenberg on the eastern front.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Hell
programme.desc: War descends into hell. The battlefield becomes a slaughterhouse. After 16 months of fighting, five million men are dead. Despite this, neither side has gained any ground until a new and terrifying machine rolls onto the battlefield: the tank.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Rage
programme.desc: People have had enough of the war and uprisings are brewing. German submarine attacks provoke the Americans, but they arrive too late to prevent the Battle of Passchendaele.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Deliverance
programme.desc: All seems lost for the Allies. The Italians are defeated at Caporette, and a Bolshevik Russia pulls out of the war. But the American reinforcements are decisive, and the Allies emerge victorious.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Fury

programme.desc: On June 28, 1914, the assassination of an obscure Austrian archduke in Sarajevo triggers the most disastrous conflict the world has ever known. Germany becomes an enemy to France, invades Belgium and, in September, arrives at the gates of Paris.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Future Warrior
programme.desc: An assault riffle that can be converted into a sniper riffle is examined.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Guns
programme.desc: A rapid-fire cannon that's becoming a hit with the US military; the personal defence weapon that has the same knockdown as bigger guns, the Gatling gun that rains fire on target and the new multi-calibre assault weapon.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Close Protection
programme.desc: A look at a top secret device that stops terrorists from smuggling weapons onto planes, the newest multi-caliber combat weapon, the latest naval gun and one of the deadliest close quarter weapons.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: In 1941, Hitler has thrown himself into a fight to the death against Stalin. Two decades earlier, in 1917, Joseph Jughashvili from Georgia is a member of Lenin's Bolshevik Party, who has just seized power in Russia. The country is torn by civil war.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: After blocking the Germans right outside of Moscow, Stalin now faces Hitler's second assault. The world's fate will be decided in Stalingrad. Like in Leningrad, men, women, and children are plunged into hell and sacrificed.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: The Soviets continue on the path to towards liberation. On the road to Berlin, they discover the horror of Hitler's extermination camps. Fifteen years earlier, Stalin transformed his country using every means at his disposal.

programme.title: American Titans: Rockefeller vs. Scott
programme.desc: John D. Rockefeller, the young new king of kerosene, and Thomas A. Scott, the visionary behind the Pennsylvania Railroad Company, battle for control of America's new oil industry.

programme.title: American Titans: Hearst vs. Pulitzer
programme.desc: In the late 1890s when William Randolph Hearst challenges the king of newspaper publishing Joseph Pulitzer in a high stakes circulation war, they change publishing forever by stopping at nothing to gain the upper hand.

programme.title: Patriots Rising: The American Revolution: Rise of the Patriots
programme.desc: Five unsung patriots strike pivotal blows for American liberty as unrest between Britain and the colonies explodes into a war for independence.

programme.title: Patriots Rising: The American Revolution: The Empire Fights Back

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Cabin Masters to the Rescue
programme.desc: In the lush woods of Manchester, Maine sits 97 acres of pristine land that was recently inherited by Gary and his wife Ellen.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Cabin in Training
programme.desc: A couple purchased a quaint cabin with an accompanying railroad caboose. The team transform both spaces to create a camp by enlarging the main cabin with more sleeping space and indoor plumbing while the caboose provides more storage and bunk space.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Call of The Loon
programme.desc: Sitting on the shores of Moosehead Lake, the cabin known as the 'Call of The Loon' has been reacquired by the original builder's great-granddaughter. Chase and the team update the amenities and add a second story to accommodate the large family.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Honeymoon Suite
programme.desc: In a Maine Cabin Masters first, Chase and his creative crew help a newlywed couple take a questionable 'wedding gift' and turn it into an alpine ski bungalow that would rival those found in the Swiss Alps.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Dixie Dog Den
programme.desc: The Cabin Masters team helps their own Matthew Dix restore his grandfather's old shed to its former glory.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: Builder Chase Morrill teams up with his brother, sister and best friend to save and transform abandoned cabins buried deep in the woods. They'll give these properties the facelift they've needed for decades. And you never know what you might find.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Golden Years Family Camp
programme.desc: After buying her parents' old summer camp in Bridgton, a mother calls on the crew to help her completely renovate the home for her parents to retire in full-time. With a $40,000 budget and an open time line, the crew transform it into a retirement space.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Six Weeks For Two A-Frames
programme.desc: Chase and his team are called in to renovate two A-Frames in Sugarloaf Valley. With only six weeks to accomplish both renovations, Chase splits the team down the middle. A friendly wager allows the winning team to dress the losing team up at dinner.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: Builder Chase Morrill teams up with his brother, sister and best friend to save and transform abandoned cabins buried deep in the woods. They'll give these properties the facelift they've needed for decades. And you never know what you might find.

programme.title: Rustic Renovation: Nisswa Cabin
programme.desc: When a family's inherited 60-year-old lakeside cabin needs updating and more room for gatherings, the brothers blow out the back wall to take over the huge porch.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Building Alaska: The Race Is On
programme.desc: The return of spring means the race is on to begin constructing homes before the return of winter shuts them down. Three builders begin construction on a fishing retreat, a ski hut and a getaway log cabin.

programme.title: Building Alaska: A Helicopter Drop, the Art of Scribing, and a Thousand-Dollar Mistake
programme.desc: Lee orchestrates a massive eighteen-load helicopter drop to deliver equipment and supplies. Derek handcrafts logs with a scriber and catalogs each piece. Tony forgets an item in town which sets him back over a thousand dollars.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Destructive Forces
programme.desc: Tony Malone's crew outside of Haines, Alaska get a visit from a hungry bear. Then, Lee Raymond faces challenges when working closely with family. Plus, Derek Galbraith reveals the tragic story behind the heli-skiing industry in Valdez, Alaska.

programme.title: Building Alaska: The Missing Helicopter
programme.desc: Lee's crew scrambles to correct a mistake after a mighty framing miscalculation. Tony makes a dangerous call to fix a problem that could destroy his own log cabin. Transport of Derek's ski hut begins, but the helicopter goes missing.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Panic Button
programme.desc: Lee's crew must push through waves of mosquitoes and fatigue to finish the deck of their Bulchitna Lake build before the floatplane arrives to take them home for a day of rest.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Taking Down the Lincoln Cabin and Building a Dog Trot
programme.desc: Mark and the guys work to dismantle a barn built by Abe Lincoln's uncle around 1830.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Big Ol' Buckeye Cabin
programme.desc: The builders have never seen a log home as large as this Ohio cabin. They discovery it's filled with history, craftsmanship and a lot of cherished memories. Mark also gives the cabin owner tips on how to convert the bar into a modern home.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Rescuing a Massive Barn, Finishing the Lincoln Cabin
programme.desc: The guys rescue a huge double-pen barn in St. Meinrad, Indiana. It's the biggest dogtrot-style barn they've ever faced. They have to fight through modern layers of tin and barnwood to get to the incredible, pioneer-era handhewn beams.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Bird's-Eye Barn
programme.desc: The guys take down a massive double-pen barn in southern Indiana. While they work to save every log and barn board, Mark visits an incredible lodge built from a different barn they took down in nearby St. Meinrad.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Charlotte, North Carolina
programme.desc: Casey Webb charges into Charlotte, North Carolina, for three takes on Southern specialties. There's a cheesy chicken classic care of Korea, a time-honored institution's signature sandwich and the biggest walking taco in all the Carolinas.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hoboken, New Jersey
programme.desc: Casey Webb's appetizing adventures take him to Hoboken, New Jersey, New York's neighbor to the west and the home of the great Frank Sinatra. He munches on homemade mozzarella and takes a bite out of a bagel behemoth.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Most Perfect Pork
programme.desc: Casey's eating odyssey has taken him all over the country and back again, and it's finally time to honour the best of the best. We're counting down the five most perfect pork dishes in Man v. Food history.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Most-Epic Wins
programme.desc: Casey's multi-year campaign against cuisine has resulted in numerous W's and now find out which was the most epic.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Boston
programme.desc: American history is illustrious in Boston, Massachusetts, and here, Andrew explores its legendary cuisine: from New England clam chowder and scrod to the hotel where Boston cream pie and Parker House rolls were invented.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: New York City
programme.desc: New York City is a melting pot of various ethnicities and culinary fusion. Andrew explores the iconic foods from the Big Apple like mile-high pastrami sandwiches, bagels and lox, pizza by the slice and the American hamburger.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: NOLA
programme.desc: New Orleans is a vibrant, eclectic city and its cuisine has been fused with a multitude of culinary influences. Andrew Zimmern explores the classic dishes from po' boys and gumbo to oysters Rockefeller and bananas Foster.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: St. Louis
programme.desc: As the Gateway to the West, St. Louis has built a reputation for homegrown goodness on the backs of its hard-working people. Andrew Zimmern explores such edible icons as St. Louis-style BBQ, toasted ravioli and gooey butter cake.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Austin
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern uncovers the one-of-a-kind tastes of Austin, Texas, a city known for 'keeping things weird.' This city excels at meaty classics like barbecue brisket, Texas chili and 10-gallon-hat-sized chicken fried steak.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Bogota
programme.desc: Andrew explores the sky-high flavors of Bogota, Colombia. This mountaintop city keeps warm with hearty potato soup, whole-roasted stuffed pork, egg filled arepas, their unique take on the tamale and cheesy hot chocolate.

programme.title: The Zimmern List: Cleveland
programme.desc: Andrew visits Cleveland for a taste of the city's culinary comeback. He gets nostalgic at the West Side Market, discovers new classics in a 100-year-old food hall and swings by a neighborhood butcher shop that's earning rave reviews.

programme.title: The Zimmern List: Miami
programme.desc: Andrew travels to Miami, Florida, where the food scene fuses new ideas with old classics. From sizzling Cuban dishes to Peruvian bites with a glitzy Miami twist, Andrew immerses himself in the bold and mouthwatering flavors of Latin America.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Goa
programme.desc: Andrew explores the local cuisine of Goa, a former Portuguese colony in western India.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: New Jersey
programme.desc: Andrew checks out the inventive and international eats of New Jersey. He tries all-you-can-eat Brazilian meat, rich seafood stew, potato-loaded hot dogs and Dominican marinated pork.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Kyoto
programme.desc: Andrew explores the elaborate feasts, home-cooked comfort food, sushi and confections of Kyoto, Japan. From the artistic multi-course dining experience to the everyday humble comfort foods.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Kansas City
programme.desc: Andrew visits Kansas City, where he discovers a swirled Croatian dessert bread and a locally-made marshmallow chocolate candy.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Festive Foods
programme.desc: Host Alfonso Ribeiro is ringing in the holidays with a feast of festive foods! Find out how Ocean Spray's jellied cranberry sauce gets that famous wiggle and how Wick's pumpkin pie is so creamy.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Hungry for Love
programme.desc: Chocolate and romance go hand in hand; explore if this love affair really backed up by chemistry.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Some Like It Hot
programme.desc: Michael cranks up the heat on food myths, discovering who invented chili, if hot wings bond people closer together and if 'spicy' is just in our heads.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Hole in One
programme.desc: Michael McKean shares the 'hole' story of everyone's favorite middle-missing baked goods.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Rags to Riches
programme.desc: Michael McKean takes a look at how some favorite foods went from paupers to princes. He looks at lobster's prison past, whether creme brulee was always the cream of the crop, and if champagne's fizz almost burst its bubble.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Power Couples
programme.desc: Michael McKean takes a look at how some favorite food combinations got hitched. Michael traces the origins of peanut butter and jelly to the trenches of World War II, sees how spaghetti and meatballs went from Italy to America.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Hungry Eyes
programme.desc: Host Michael McKean chases rainbows to explain how our food's color can leave us tickled pink or feeling blue. Michael uncovers if cheddar cheese is really orange and if color can cause a taste bud blackout.

programme.title: Good Eats: My Big Fat Greek Sandwich
programme.desc: Alton tacks rotisseries and tzatziki sauce in his quest to make a gyro sandwich at home.

programme.title: Good Eats: Turn on the Dark
programme.desc: Join Alton Brown for an hour- long special revealing the secret power of dark chocolate.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Global Grub
programme.desc: Roger Mooking takes 15 gastronomical trips for the most exotic, flavourful and spicy foods all without leaving the U.S. The featured chefs create classic international meals from Ethiopia, Thailand, Mexico and more in their own American kitchens.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Smoked
programme.desc: Roger Mooking criss-crosses America to count down 15 of the very best steaks, wings, Reubens and more- all made even better with glorious smoke. From salt-cured country ham to smoked fish chowder, bacon bourbon rib-eye steak to smoky s'mores pancakes.

programme.title: Movie: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Out of the Shadows
programme.desc: With April's help, the Turtles find out that The Shredder has returned and has hired a scientist to create mutants of his own. Adding to their troubles, New York City is invaded by an extraterrestrial army. The Turtles face their toughest fight yet.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb Christmas Vacation!
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb want to show Santa how grateful they are for the work that he does every year at Christmas time by transforming the city of Danville into a giant shimmering thank you card and building a rest stop for Santa to relax in.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: A Phineas and Ferb Family Christmas
programme.desc: The boys decide to put on a traditional family Christmas special featuring their family, friends and guests. Featuring new holiday songs including: Buford and Baljeet sing 'Good King Wenceslas' and the whole gang sings 'We Wish You a Merry Christmas.'

programme.title: DuckTales: Moonvasion!
programme.desc: The family rallies an army to defend against an invasion. As Della and the kids search the globe for reinforcements, Scrooge leads his ragtag troops against Lunaris’ forces.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Impossible Summit of Mt. Neverrest!
programme.desc: Scrooge and Huey are determined to be the first to set foot atop an impossible summit, but the mountain holds a treacherous secret which had them test both their commitment and survival.

programme.title: DuckTales: Last Christmas!
programme.desc: Scrooge celebrates Christmas with his time-traveling ghost buddies while time-lost Dewey teams with Young Donald to find his mom on Christmas.

programme.title: DuckTales
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: The Present
programme.desc: When Hiro finds a wrapped present in the closet, he assumes it's from Aunt Cass and takes it in order to figure out what it is. However, after a mix-up, the present becomes lost and Hiro enlists the Big Hero 6 team to track it down.

programme.title: DuckTales: Challenge of the Senior Junior Woodchucks!
