programme.desc: In Dallas, detectives investigate the shooting of a young man left in the trunk of an abandoned car.

programme.title: The First 48: Cut Down/ 9-1-1
programme.desc: Detective Garcia investigates the shooting death of a local homeless man, known for looking after his fellow transient friends, and learns that the victim's commendable behaviour may have instigated his death.

programme.title: The First 48: Fear Factor/ Fall Guy
programme.desc: In Birmingham, detectives investigate the murder of a 21-year-old male found dead in a field. In Charlotte, a man is chased down and killed in front of his young daughter.

programme.title: The First 48: Last Words/ Nowhere to Hide
programme.desc: In Birmingham, a man is beaten and shot in the middle of a housing complex during the day. An 18-year-old male is gunned down in an apartment complex.

programme.title: The First 48: Brutal Business
programme.desc: A homicide team investigates the double murders of two friends who were brutally shot and burned beyond recognition in the trunk of a car.

programme.title: The First 48: Jacked/ Fallen Idol
programme.desc: In Dallas, a young father is ambushed at a gas station, and Det. Steve David needs to track him down. Then in Miami, a beloved local rapper is gunned down at his car wash, and detectives suspect it was an inside job.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Not Safe for Work
programme.desc: Timing is everything in comedy. The contestants test their comedy on unsuspecting strangers; teach office staff about proper safety techniques and test their luck with online dating profiles.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Ruffled Feathers
programme.desc: The guys conduct focus groups to sell their illogical inventions created by the other guys, then head to a shoe store where they get off on the wrong foot. Plus, tonight's big loser discovers he’s more flight than fight at the zoo.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Captain Fatbelly
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q lend an unhelpful hand while working at a high-tech store, then play detectives at the mall in search of perps on the loose. Tonight's loser gets the shakes while soaring high above the city.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dog Days of Bummer
programme.desc: French fries are the topic of competition in a food court. The gang then starts trouble in a Burger restaurant.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Virtual Insanity
programme.desc: The guys bark up the wrong tree at a pet store, and tonight’s big loser virtually loses his mind after entering a world he’s never visited before.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Swim Shady
programme.desc: Find out how long Q was 'sleeping' before the guys decided to have him stay asleep for 30 minutes.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Parent Trap
programme.desc: The guys get stuck in a grocery post-it showdown, and tonight's big loser earns a time-out for his outrageous behavior at a kids' play space.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Mime and Punishment
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q put the nasty in namaste when they lead guided meditations. Tonight's big loser gets boxed in with a 24-hour punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Q-Pay
programme.desc: Find out which joker has a weak spot for animals that the other guys love to exploit, who made the best wingman back in his single days and how long it took Q to grow out his hair long enough for a wig.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Lost Boy
programme.desc: Find out which joker once worked as a fish monger, who lied on his resume to snag a TV internship and what chain restaurant the guys used during Sal's 'shush!' punishment at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Take Me Out at the Ballgame
programme.desc: Find out how Murr chose which guys to honk at Volcano Bay, what happened to the TP used in the stock boy shootout, and how Joe stayed safe after messing with NY Mets fans at Citi Field.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Just Say No
programme.desc: Find out which joker loves blackjack, what baseball team two of the guys split season tickets for and how they found the lovely lady whose heart Q broke during his ball field punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Make Womb for Daddy
programme.desc: Find out who scored free sandwiches while shooting at Blimpie; what classic game inspired the 'Guess What' challenge; and what was worse for Q than the pain he endured during his 'childbirth' punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Sneaking Number Twos, Going Number One
programme.desc: Find out why the jokers love filming at the grocery store, how many pencils were purchased for put-pocketing and why Sal's pee punishment was twice as terrible as it looked.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Antisocial Network
programme.desc: Learn which Joker claims to be a great matchmaker and just why it is the gang doesn't film often at malls. Plus, find out which focus group pitches didn't make the cut.

programme.title: Top Secret Videos: Operation Hidden Roof
programme.desc: Featured in this episode are a machete-wielding vigilante in underwear, a swimming pool selfie stick debacle and a hoofed menace. Plus, the NSA interns dispose of an oddly erotic project.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: No Good Deed
programme.desc: Find out what after-school activity Joe's mom forbid him from doing, why filming nearly halted during the jack asses challenge and what last minute idea made it into Sal and Joe's charity funds punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Running of the Bullies
programme.desc: Find out which Joker's waiter experience made meal or no meal a breeze, why there was a white noise machine needed during dust bunnies and who issued a siren warning right after Sal's pool punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Like a Boss
programme.desc: Why the slow-moving line at The Fast and the Furious ride made things harder for the guys, who officiated Joe's wedding, and why last-minute changes were needed for Murr's Tumblr punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: Find out which joker owned a bar in Staten Island, what had the crew crying laughing and whose dad grew up on a chicken farm.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: White Tasty
programme.desc: Tone Bell schools a lucky person on the street, Jade Catta-Preta goes hard at Tone's love life, and Noah Gardenswartz spots someone very special in the crowd.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Made Me Laugh
programme.desc: Vanessa Fraction spots a 70's sitcom star in the crowd, Rojo Perez makes an inappropriate exit, and Tone Bell reads a crowd member's mind.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Where's the Bathroom?
programme.desc: Pete Lee reveals how millennials cure glaucoma, Michelle Buteau becomes a guidance counselor, and Matthew Broussard unmasks a German techno DJ in the crowd.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Russian Interference
programme.desc: Gina Yashere obsesses over the contents of a crowd member's pants, Joel Kim Booster knows exactly what not to say as a Pilates teacher, and Dave Hill tries a unique style of crowd work.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Pink Slime
programme.desc: Michael feeds some book worms while working at a book store. Plus, he serves food and gives new meaning to the phrase 'grass fed beef'. Then, he spooks his assistant at a food testing center with an experiment.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Chilly Flakes and Wormholes
programme.desc: Michael works in a spice shop and gets an icy treatment with his take on 'chilly flakes'. Plus, he cleans a spill at a hotel with his phone. Afterwards, at an abandoned house, he amazes his assistant by climbing through a wormhole.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Cat Lady
programme.desc: At auditions, Michael wows directors with costume changes but cracks when he sings. Plus, things get sticky when he demos flying post-its. Then, Michael's co-worker's jaw drops when a shape-shifting tenant returns while they clean house.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: A Faux Pas to Wear

programme.title: North Woods Law: Mysteries in the Moose State
programme.desc: Some of the wardens enter the annual moose-hunting lottery. Meanwhile, Craven tracks down the mythical Main mountain lion and the wardens try to find an elderly man lost in the woods.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Throttle Out
programme.desc: A sledder takes a jump that lands him in the hospital and the wardens investigate the crash. The wardens chase down a group of drunk snowmobilers. A strange pile of animal parts in the snow leads the wardens to a family of poachers.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Stranded and Abandoned
programme.desc: Officers Lucas and Cyrs attempt a treacherous rescue on Mt. Washington, while Lt. Boudreau tracks down the owner of an abandoned vehicle. Officer Hannett and Trainee Crouse investigate a man shooting squirrels. Officer Fluette responds to a bear call.

programme.title: North Woods Law: No Trespassing
programme.desc: Lt. Boudreau and Officer Hannett investigate a possible illegal turkey kill site, while Officer Bronson responds to a call about a snake in a bed. Officer Demler confronts a suspect about shooting a turkey on private property.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Uncuffed: Cliffs of Peril
programme.desc: On Cannon Cliffs, a heroic helicopter rescue mission ensues to save an injured rock climber, while Officer Crouse questions an aggressive OHRV rider. Officer MacFazden handles a suspicious deer kill, and a group of ATV speedsters are caught.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Still Hunting: Dawn Patrol
programme.desc: Pre-dawn on opening day of rifle season, Lt. Boudreau and Officer Hannett pursue a night hunter. While up north, Officers Canfield and St. Pierre battle the snow to work a deer decoy. And in the city, Officer Frye wrestles an aggressive wild turkey.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Alligator Showdown
programme.desc: Officers Bill Boudreau and Eric Hannett investigate a man raising alligators in the attic of his home. As night falls over the White Mountains, Officers Glenn Lucas and Eric Fluette ascend into the darkness to rescue a lost group of hikers.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Uncuffed: Lies and Lizards
programme.desc: New Hampshire conservation officers deal with problems involving all creatures great and small, but an aggressive and angry lizard on the loose is certainly an uncommon distress call in the woods of the northeast.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Brawl in the Family
programme.desc: At the start of hunting season in Maine, the wardens nab violators who are illegally illuminating wildlife, firing guns from their vehicles, and hunting over baited deer stands. Warden Lounder finds himself in a dangerous situation when he is surrounded.

programme.title: North Woods Law: To Serve and Protect
programme.desc: The game wardens are guardians of Maine's wildlife, but they also protect the public. Warden Carter must find an injured bear. A search is mounted for a missing man in the woods. Wardens MacCabe and Stevens track down hunters.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Occupational Hazards
programme.desc: Deep in the Maine woods, danger lurks behind every tree for the game wardens. Warden Herring comes across a sprawling illegal encampment on private property. Warden Stevens discovers three marijuana grows and must seize dozens of plants.

programme.title: North Woods Law: In a Hot Second
programme.desc: On land and water, it's the wardens' job to keep people safe. Warden McBrine coordinates a LifeFlight helicopter for the victim of a serious car crash. Warden Buuck spreads the word on boating safety.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Lights! Croc! Action!
programme.desc: Get a behind the scenes look at Steve and Terri's new movie as they try to act.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: They Shoot Crocodiles Don't They
programme.desc: Steve turns the camera around to introduce the photographers who film his adventures.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Whale Sharks of the Wild West
programme.desc: Steve, Terri and Bindi swim with dolphins, seals and sharks. Steve dives to the ancient wreck of the Batavia and explores a habitat of Tamar wallabies and pythons.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Swimming With Manta Rays
programme.desc: Robert travels to Australia's Great Barrier Reef to help conduct research on manta rays. The Zoo's Rescue Unit, Wildlife Hospital and Volunteers team up to save a baby wallaby struggling to survive. Bindi gets up close and personal with Archie the Dingo.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Giraffe Road Trip
programme.desc: The family prepares Croc One, Steve Irwin's research ship, for a mission to release an endangered sea turtle back to the wild. Scarlett the Giraffe is reunited with her grandmother, and Grub the wild Echidna is released from the Zoo's Wildlife Hospital.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Irwin African Adventure
programme.desc: Following Steve's dream of global conservation, the Irwins travel to South Africa. Terri helps release a wild leopard, Bindi learns from the all-female anti-poaching squad The Black Mambas, and Robert attempts to photograph Africa's 'Big Five.'

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Bindi and the Otters
programme.desc: Wes and Robert remove eggs from the nest of saltwater crocs Terra and Bosco, in a nerve-wracking but necessary venture. Bindi tends to the training of otters Percival and Daisy, and Terri makes a Zoo Volunteer's dream come true.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Steve's Legacy Continues
programme.desc: After months of training, Robert steps into his father's shoes to feed Graham, Australia Zoo's most notorious crocodile, solo, in front of the entire Crocoseum. Bindi witnesses one of nature's rarest events: Cedar the Koala has given birth to twins.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Tiger Eyes
programme.desc: It's a big day for Hunter the Sumatran Tiger. He is blind and must be sedated for his annual eye check, allowing Terri to get closer than usual. The keepers prepare the young giraffe Scarlett for a road trip to South Australia, reuniting her with family.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Bindi's Lemur Island
programme.desc: The Australia Zoo's Alligator Snapping Turtles need a health check, and it's Robert's job to protect from their fierce bites. Terri and Bindi welcome seven new Lemurs from the US. The Zoo's Rescue Unit is called to save possums caught in a chimney.

programme.desc: A couple moved to Las Vegas with their kids and her mom, but their plan to live together was cut short when her mom passed away, Drew and Jonathan are asked to renovate multiple rooms so they can start over in their dream home.

programme.title: House Hunters: Jersey Shore Waterfront
programme.desc: A DJ and his fiancee are excited to search for a vacation home on the Jersey Shore. They're looking for a place big enough for visiting family, and she wants a ground-level ranch-style home, but he's looking for something on stilts with rental potential.

programme.title: House Hunters International: Honeymoon House Hunt in Berlin
programme.desc: Having met in a high school German class, a newlywed couple starts their life together in her native Berlin. They're looking for a fully furnished one-bedroom apartment with space for visiting guests, but agreeing on the right place may not be so easy.

programme.title: House Hunters: Home is Where the Horse is in Denver
programme.desc: A young family searches for a home that's close to where they board their horse in Denver. She wants a farmhouse feel with plenty of room for her beloved dining room table, but he's looking for a smaller living space and wants a three-car garage.

programme.title: House Hunters International: From the Burbs to Brighton
programme.desc: A Washington couple takes a sabbatical in Brighton, England, to have more quality time with their kids. He hopes their new city will give the kids a global perspective, but she worries the change might be hard for them.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Forever Home: Old Neighborhood, New House
programme.desc: A couple found a home with lots of potential to raise their large family. Now they need to make the home functional for their family's future. The dated floor plan on the main floor and the kitchen's awkward layout both need improvement.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Navigating Rough Waters for a Picture Perfect Property
programme.desc: Tyler and Lindsay love their waterfront lifestyle, but their tiny condo is giving them the squeeze.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Honeymooning and House Hunting
programme.desc: Newlyweds, busy professionals, and animal lovers, Sophie, Tim, and their two dogs are determined to get out of his cramped condo.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: Shared Driveways and Slim Margins
programme.desc: A couple wants to quit their day jobs in hopes of earning a massive return on a dilapidated Los Angeles Craftsman. A shared driveway and stress from a hard-money loan complicate the flip, and the couple calls on Tarek El Moussa to get it back on track.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: Failing to Plan Is Planning to Fail
programme.desc: Lidia and Fernando are putting all their savings on the line to flip their first home in Rancho Cucamonga. She's a dreamer obsessed with expensive design. He is so neurotic about losing money, he's trying to skimp everywhere he can.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: Dancing With Disaster
programme.desc: Patricia and Legacy are professional dancers turned house flippers and a high-end project in Brentwood has them seeing dollar signs. Their hideously expensive loan and a major foundation problem threaten to ruin this flip from the start.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: Fighting All the Way to the Bank
programme.desc: Contractor and real estate agent brothers should be the perfect flipping team, but their business has been a flop due to opposing priorities. They have no plans for their latest project, so Tarek steps in to guide the tempestuous duo over the finish line.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: A Flipping Family Nightmare
programme.desc: Junes and his mom share a dream of building a family flipping business, but this flip in Long Beach is quickly becoming a nightmare. Blaming each other for mistakes and losing money, they disagree on who should be doing what.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: That New Flipper Smell
programme.desc: A 19 year old ignores his family's pleas to go to college to start his real estate investment career. An investor agreed to let him take lead on a flip, and Tarek must coach him to be fearless when facing an $80,000 renovation.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: Broken Slab to Totally Fab
programme.desc: A couple is tired of mediocre profits and asks Tarek to help with their next flip in Anaheim, CA. Even with his guidance, they struggle to make the right decisions and face an uphill battle when the local market starts to buck.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: The Craziest Ceiling in Compton
programme.desc: A couple that flipped a home with Tarek in the past must call on him again after buying a home with stalactites on the ceilings and competition nearby. When Tarek learns they didn't call the city about permits, he doubts whether the project can be saved.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: A Horrible Hoarder House
programme.desc: Alison and Mondo are amateur flippers who have not only taken on the worst house on the block, but the worst house Tarek has ever seen.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: Bad Energy BoHo
programme.desc: Tarek mentors real estate novices to help them learn the secrets of a successful flip.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: Style vs. Substance
programme.desc: A couple takes on a flip in pricey Pasadena, CA, and battles between what looks good and what's affordable. Tarek steps in to get them on the same page before project delays, a challenging lot and unforeseen problems turn their flip into a nightmare.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: Communication Breakdown
programme.desc: A couple buys a small home in Sylmar, CA, in hopes of finishing quickly and turning a modest profit. On top of a cracked foundation and failing retaining wall, he's willing to take risks that she is not, so Tarek steps in to get them through the project.

programme.title: Windy City Rehab: To Sell or Not to Sell
programme.desc: Alison Victoria wants to give a neglected Bucktown home an upscale, English-style makeover. However, she faces a tough financial decision when a potential buyer makes a full-price offer that requires her to change the entire design.

programme.title: Windy City Rehab: Lincoln Park Fourplex
programme.desc: Alison and Donovan decide to renovate a 1900s two-flat home in Lincoln Square and convert it back into a single-family home. However, when they decide to sell to a pre-buyer, every decision leads to additional expenses and delays.

programme.title: Windy City Rehab: Fire Sale Fail to Dream Duplex
programme.desc: While looking for a property in Wicker Park, Alison and Donovan discover what seems like a great deal on an 1885 triplex with fire damage. Even as they start picking out pieces for it, hidden structural damage from the fire starts burning up profits.

programme.title: Windy City Rehab: Skyline Penthouse
programme.desc: Alison and Donovan take on a penthouse with the potential for some serious profit. However, what seems like an easy renovation quickly goes off the rails when an inexperienced superintendent tries to hide his shoddy work.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Goodnight Mooooooon
programme.desc: From unplanned pregnancies and long labors to mystery symptoms and power outages, the vets at Pol Veterinary Services have their hands full!

programme.title: What on Earth?: Monsters of Diamond Desert
programme.desc: An abandoned ghost town in a remote desert with a dark past. When a strange facility is spotted in Russia, experts investigate if it's hiding evidence of alien life.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Bermuda Triangle of Space
programme.desc: When instruments on the International Space Station suddenly malfunction every time it passes over a mysterious site in the Atlantic Ocean, experts investigate if this eerie behaviours is more than just a tech glitch, but a prophecy of global doomsday.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Cannibal Death Pit
programme.desc: A strange circular forest is found next to a notorious cannibal site. Then, when an eerie crater is spotted in Siberia, experts uncover if it could be evidence of Nikola Tesla's doomsday device.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Ruins of Cannibal City
programme.desc: When an extreme drought hits Spain, the ruins of a long-lost civilization suddenly emerge, and using cutting-edge technology, experts investigate evidence of ancient cannibalism.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Imhotep's Lost Labyrinth
programme.desc: After satellites spot an anomaly at Egypt's oldest pyramid, experts uncover a long-lost labyrinth. It could lead them to the darkest secrets of Imhotep, the mysterious high priest who built this strange complex.

programme.title: Deadly Engineering: Day of the Death Quake
programme.desc: The devastating Northridge earthquake struck Los Angeles in 1994 killing 57 people and causing $20 billion in damage in less than 20 seconds; expert scientists and engineers investigate why these structures were not prepared for the violent disaster.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: Titan on the Water
programme.desc: A cutting-edge engineering marvel can lift boats and water to astonishing heights, and its advanced design makes it the first and only construction of its kind; behind-the-scenes access shows how it works.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: F-35 Fighter Jet
programme.desc: The F-35 is the most advanced fighter jet on the planet, and special access into the most expensive military program ever reveals how engineers use cutting-edge technology to outfit this 1,200 mile-per-hour aircraft with a state-of-the-art stealth system.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: City of the Damned
programme.desc: A deserted town in Spain with a bloody past and a ghost fleet heading nowhere are homes to dark secrets.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Nazi Ghost Town
programme.desc: Revisit a Soviet megastructure, a massive Nazi brainwashing complex, and a dangerous desert pass to find out how they were built and why they were mysteriously abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Curse of the Haunted Prison
programme.desc: A mysterious American pyramid built out of Cold War paranoia, a haunted prison, and a strange cluster of structures in the Atlantic are mysterious deserted engineering projects are investigated.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Desert Ghost Fort
programme.desc: A secret Russian military base in the Gobi Desert, a strange complex in an American wasteland, and a relic high atop a mountain are mysterious deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: America's Doomsday Town
programme.desc: A strange deserted city in America's heartland, an eerie gigantic wall deep in snow-capped mountains, and a mysterious top-secret Soviet facility were built and then abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secrets of the Alien Shrine
programme.desc: A strange alien shrine on a mountain peak, a bridge built in the Alaskan wilderness, and an American castle with a dangerous secret are mysterious deserted engineering projects and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Real Shawshank
programme.desc: An eerie prison with a dark past that became the setting of an iconic Hollywood movie and alien monoliths on a strange and remote island are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Nightmare at Fort Paranoia
programme.desc: A strange bunker in a treacherous landscape once belonged a notorious dictator who's paranoid fantasies drove bizarre and elaborate feats of engineering. New discoveries reveal the secrets of these structures and why the nightmares that built them.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Armageddon Highway
programme.desc: A strange Cuban prison, an eerie escape route built for Armageddon, and an underwater marvel that changed history are mysterious deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Arctic Hell Pit
programme.desc: Traces of a Russian hole to hell in the Arctic, a military base in America's Wild West, and a strange looming tower are mysterious deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: House of Horror
programme.desc: An eerie set of buildings in Paris is evidence of an unspeakable evil. New discoveries reveal the horrific things that happened here, and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Curse of Satan's Catacombs
programme.desc: An abandoned system of caves was once the meeting place of a secret society that worshiped Satan and performed black magic. New discoveries at this mysterious site reveal what really happened here and why a Founding Father was a frequent guest.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Soap Star's Secret
programme.desc: Thom Bierdz had finally made it big. When he brought his troubled younger brother out to Los Angeles, he thought he could help set him straight. He never expected that the price he would pay for being wrong would be the life of someone he loved.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Grim Reaper
programme.desc: When Linda found out her biological father was her family friend, Greg Scarpa, she was overjoyed. But when the rest of Greg's bloody secrets came out, Linda learned that being part of his family wasn't just dangerous, it was potentially deadly.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Our Secret Identity
programme.desc: As a child, Pam Jacobs spent years of her life on the run from the law. But she had no idea that her father, Charles Sinclair, was a wanted man until the day the FBI caught up with them.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: On the Run
programme.desc: When Susan Hamlin walks into a police station to confess that she is part of a satanic cult and plans to murder her husband, no one could guess that the truth is even more bizarre and sinister, or that it is all part of her own desperate escape plan.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Jane Doe
programme.desc: Judith Therianos is a free-spirit; someone who very much wants to see the good in everyone. But Florida detectives unearth video surveillance that shows her utterly alone and blissfully unaware of the danger just moments before her life is cut short.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: The Great Don Lewis
programme.desc: Donald Lewis is a popular musician who owns a local Jazz Cafe. Despite being beloved in the community, mystery strikes when he suddenly disappears from his jazz club along with his employee. Detectives must find the both of them before it's too late.

programme.title: The Menendez Brothers: The Crimes That Changed Us
programme.desc: When a Hollywood executive and his wife are brutally killed in a wealthy neighbourhood, suspicion falls on their two sons. Charged with the murders, the brothers reveal disturbing family secrets, and the scene is set for one of the most shocking trials.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Killing Field
programme.desc: The parents of a young South Carolina couple are terrified when they go missing in 2016. Detectives find a clue that leads to strange storage container in the middle of 95 acres. What's inside unlocks secrets of a monster hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: The Great Don Lewis
programme.desc: Donald Lewis is a popular musician who owns a local Jazz Cafe. Despite being beloved in the community, mystery strikes when he suddenly disappears from his jazz club along with his employee. Detectives must find the both of them before it's too late.

programme.title: The Menendez Brothers: The Crimes That Changed Us
programme.desc: When a Hollywood executive and his wife are brutally killed in a wealthy neighbourhood, suspicion falls on their two sons. Charged with the murders, the brothers reveal disturbing family secrets, and the scene is set for one of the most shocking trials.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Jeffrey MacDonald: The Accused
programme.desc: An army surgeon, Jeffrey MacDonald, is the lone survivor of a brutal 1970 home invasion that claims the lives of his wife and daughters. But authorities doubt his story of murderous hippies and believe MacDonald is the culprit.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Jane Doe
programme.desc: Judith Therianos is a free-spirit; someone who very much wants to see the good in everyone. But Florida detectives unearth video surveillance that shows her utterly alone and blissfully unaware of the danger just moments before her life is cut short.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Online Education
programme.desc: Texas A&M University professor Dr. Jim Aune appears to have it all, but unknown to his family or students, his life is in freefall as dark online secrets threaten to spill out into real life.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Mr. Fix It
programme.desc: City-girl Leslie Belkin moves south and meets a man on Craigslist. At first George seems perfect - he's nice and helpful around the yard. But once she discovers his criminal record, she realizes she isn't the only casual encounter George has made online.

programme.title: Dateline: After Midnight
programme.desc: A mother’s intuition leads campus cops in Western New York to a terrible discovery in a dorm room.

programme.title: Dateline: The Devil in Disguise
programme.desc: An ex-Navy man marries the love of his life. Five months later his new bride finds him dead on their bedroom floor. With no apparent cause of death, family and authorities are left puzzled.

programme.title: Dateline: While He Was Sleeping
programme.desc: When a successful luxury car dealer is murdered in his sleep, detectives soon focus in on one of the victim’s many lovers. But with little hard evidence to go on, the investigation stalls – until a year later.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Hit and Run
programme.desc: Two can keep a secret, if one of them is dead. These Deadly Women think they've committed the perfect murders.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Without Mercy
programme.desc: Every murder is a tragedy but some are unthinkable.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Kill the Competition
programme.desc: In the game of love the stakes are high not everyone can be a winner.

programme.title: Deadly Women: In the Family
programme.desc: Some killers don't go far to find their victims. Driven by revenge, greed and family 'honor,' these women turned on their own. When these Deadly Women struck, they kept it 'In the Family.'

programme.title: The Case That Haunts Me: She Said...
programme.desc: When a terrified sex worker asks Detective Penny Hart for help, she knows it must be serious. Things quickly intensify when the same frightened informant goes missing and is feared to be dead.

programme.title: The Case That Haunts Me: Out of Lies
programme.desc: Lethbridge Police Detective Ryan Stef pushes his investigative creativity to the limit as he tries to solve the vicious murder of an innocent grandmother.

programme.title: The Case That Haunts Me: Last Move
programme.desc: When 72 year-old Bruce Firman is found brutally murdered in his home, Detective Keri Harrison must discover who would want this kind, elderly man dead.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: Operation Celestial Balance
programme.desc: In 1998 the bombers of the US Embassy in Nairobi started a trail of destruction that the CIA had to stop. It's Al Qaeda's first attack. The trail leads to Somalia and Mogadishu. The CIA bribes warlords and use drones to track and kill an untried man.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: Killing the Bombers
programme.desc: The bombers of the USS Cole in the Yemen port of Aden are found but the leadership remains elusive. After 9/11, Al Qaeda escalate their attacks and the godfather of terror is revealed. His use of a satphone locates him and he's killed by a drone.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: The Beirut Bomb
programme.desc: The true story of how CIA Director William Casey allegedly sanctioned an off-the-books assassination attempt on Sheikh Mohammed Fadlallah in Beirut in 1985. Casey was convinced Fadlallah was the head of Hezbollah and behind a series of terrorist attacks.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: The Hunt for Che Guevara
programme.desc: Che Guevara is intent on destroying the U.S. The CIA sends agent, Felix Rodriguez, to Bolivia to bring him back alive. Based on new documents we now reveal the true story of this secret CIA mission to hunt down the world's most famous revolutionary.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Nashville
programme.desc: In a daring attempt to regain the upper hand in the Civil War, Confederate forces try to retake the city of Nashville and sever the supply line that's feeding the Union invasion of the south.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Petersburg
programme.desc: The Union invasion of the south has ground to a halt at the seemingly impregnable ring of trenches built around Petersburg, Virginia. After eight bloody attempts to storm them have failed, two officers from Vermont will lead a daring raid.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Gettysburg
programme.desc: An elite band of Yankee Sharpshooters must stop Robert E. Lee's Alabamian shock troops from flanking the Union line and winning the battle of Gettysburg and perhaps the entire Civil War.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Fredericksburg
programme.desc: Following the strategic Union win at Antietam, Federal forces clash with a massive rebel army in the town of Fredericksburg, Virginia in what will become the largest fight of the Civil War.

programme.desc: Che Guevara is intent on destroying the U.S. The CIA sends agent, Felix Rodriguez, to Bolivia to bring him back alive. Based on new documents we now reveal the true story of this secret CIA mission to hunt down the world's most famous revolutionary.

programme.desc: The true story of how CIA Director William Casey allegedly sanctioned an off-the-books assassination attempt on Sheikh Mohammed Fadlallah in Beirut in 1985. Casey was convinced Fadlallah was the head of Hezbollah and behind a series of terrorist attacks.

programme.desc: During the Great Depression, a violent crime wave is sweeping the nation. It was up to the FBI's Melvin Purvis to lead a massive manhunt for the most dangerous men in America.

programme.title: American Titans: Rockefeller vs. Scott

programme.title: American Titans: Carnegie vs. Frick

programme.title: American Titans: Edison vs. Tesla

programme.title: Ultimate Weapons: Sniper Rifles

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Below Board
programme.desc: Mike Holmes discovers that a house that looks good on the outside is hiding a rotting secret just below the surface, and now it’s a problem that threatens an entire neighbourhood.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Flood Suckers
programme.desc: After a historic downpour in the City of Toronto, Gina’s basement floods with water from the city’s sewage system. Mike does double-duty as he tries to save this family’s home as well as the memories stored in an old workshop in the basement.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Investment Gate
programme.desc: Mike Holmes helps a couple pick up the pieces after getting conned out of $300,000 by a contractor friend who has conned millions from other families.

programme.title: Holmes Inspection: No Breathing Room
programme.desc: James and Doreen were thrilled to be able to afford a house for their growing family. Unfortunately the deal closed before they could read their home inspection report. After moving in they discover problems that made parts of the house off limits.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: What Comes Down Must Go Up
programme.desc: Facing major structural and water issues at the river house, Mike and MJ decide to take the whole house down so they can build it back up right. This is a major setback, and their profit will take a big hit unless they identify some areas to save.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Decisions and Delays
programme.desc: Trusses go up at the river house until MJ learns that the permits for the new build have not yet been approved. Mike goes to the council meeting hoping to hear good news, but it's a waiting game in the meantime. Designer Sarah Richardson offers advice.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Debates, Decisions, Designer
programme.desc: The leaching bed is replaced at the country house, and work progresses until Mike and MJ find out an open permit remains on the barn. Later, the big day finally arrives when MJ and Lisa get married in a picturesque setting, as long as the rain holds off.

programme.title: Rustic Renovation: Quonset Hut to Guest House
programme.desc: The guys use reclaimed materials to create bright and functional guest quarters in the dark, unsafe storage space of a World War II Quonset hut. The sleeping area features custom beds, and the kitchen is build out with butcher block countertops.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Restored: The Yellow Victorian Farmhouse Facelift
programme.desc: Brett restores a Victorian farmhouse with an odd floor plan. Major foundation issues complicate the project, but the happy homeowners end up with a beautiful and functional house they could never have imagined.

programme.title: Restored: 1947 Postmodern Ranch
programme.desc: Brett restores a 1947 postmodern ranch back to its post-World War II style for a military veteran and his wife. However, he has to make some tough decisions when the homeowners want to get rid of the original kitchen tile.

programme.title: Restored: 1940s Modern Ranch
programme.desc: Brett restores a 1941 modern ranch in Redlands, CA, for a couple who recently inherited the home from her grandfather.

programme.title: Restored: 1923 Mediterranean Revival
programme.desc: Brett's new clients recently purchased their first home together, a 1923 Mediterranean Revival, and want to restore it after years of small updates from the previous owners.

programme.title: Restored: 1905 Queen Anne Victorian Restoration
programme.desc: One of Brett's old high school friends asks him to help restore her 1905 Queen Anne Victorian bungalow. She has many unfinished renovation projects but wants to finish them. She also wants to convert a bedroom into the office it was designed to be.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Rustic English Re-tree-t
programme.desc: Pete and his team embark on a quest to an idyllic farm in Waxhaw, NC with orders to craft an elegant English retreat with a hanging bed fit for a queen. But one thing might stand in the way of Pete and his holy grail of pastoral treehouse builds, goats!

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Zac Brown's Space Crab
programme.desc: Country superstar Zac Brown tasks Pete with building an otherworldly treehouse at Camp Southern Ground, a state-of-the-art camp for kids. The team constructs a zinc-wrapped treehouse that's half spaceship, half horseshoe crab, and fully out of this world.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Merry Fishmas!
programme.desc: Pete heads to Dogwood Canyon, a 10,000 acre nature preserve in Missouri. Despite a tight Christmas deadline, Pete and his team create a two-story hands-on learning haven with a giant copper-topped turret that can endure thousands of visitors.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Magical Modern Treehouse
programme.desc: Equipped with a 205 ft zipline entrance through the trees, Pete and his team work modern magic in Georgia.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Barbecue in the Big Apple
programme.desc: Michael Symon is joined by his good buddy Michael Strahan at their favorite New York City burger spot. They bounce around The Big Apple dining on meatball sliders, succulent St. Louis style ribs and pastrami-topped pizza.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Stuffed, Spicy and Cheesy
programme.desc: In Queens, N.Y., Michael Symon gets in touch with his Greek heritage with a classic lamb and feta cheeseburger, and then he sinks his teeth into an Italian-style burger stuffed with smoky mozzarella and prosciutto.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Meat Lover's Madness
programme.desc: Michael Symon heads to his hometown of Cleveland to visit a brewery that revolutionizes classic pub fare with decadent confit chicken wings in chipotle-maple glaze.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Sausages, Franks and Dogs
programme.desc: In Sagaponack, N.Y., Michael Symon heads to a smokehouse where succulent, slow-smoked pork ribs are mopped with a tangy, citrus barbecue sauce. In Columbus, Ohio, there's a beefy burger topped with smoky kielbasa.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Crawfish to California
programme.desc: Noah Cappe goes coastal at the Louisiana Crawfish Festival.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Million Dollar Baby Cakes

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Children of the Corn on the Cob

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Point Break-Fast
programme.desc: Noah Cappe starts the day right at the Shasta District Fair in Anderson, California.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Deliciously Doughy
programme.desc: Noah Cappe rolls across America with a list of deliciously doughy midway munchies that he 'kneads' to try. From the OMG Pretzel Bomb to the Pumpkin Pie Beignet, these treats are perfect for all the gluten gluttons and yeasty boys and girls.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Return of the Mac
programme.desc: Noah Cappe digs in to seven ooey-gooey versions of the classic American casserole. Whether it's stacked in a sandwich, layered in a hot dog, rolled into a taco or topped with lobster, these mac and cheese creations are crave-worthy carnival treats.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Swine and Dine

programme.title: Food Paradise: Viva Las Vegas

programme.desc: Jack tries to deliver mail on a pogo stick, Markiplier takes on a boss battle in Cuphead, Dan swallows up scenery in Donut County, and Muselk attempts a new Fortnite challenge.

programme.title: Amphibia: Grubhog Day/ Hop Pop and Lock
programme.desc: During Grubhog Day, Sprig has to decide whether to uphold his responsibilities or have fun at the carnival. To impress Sylvia Sundew, Hop Pop asks Anne to teach him to dance.

programme.title: Amphibia: Snow Day/ Cracking Mrs. Croaker
programme.desc: When a winter cold snap freezes all the frogs in Wartwood, Anne must protect the townspeople. In an effort to make Mrs. Croaker like him, Sprig digs up a secret from her past.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Agent Doof/ Phineas and Ferb the Temple of Juatchadoon
programme.desc: The boys go to Central America to help Damsel in Distress, after finding an amulet, but Dr. Doofenshmirtz wants to use their amulet to destroy the world.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Doofapus/ Norm Unleashed
programme.desc: Candace liquefies herself with one of the boys' inventions. Then Phineas and Ferb invent nanobots that can assemble themselves into any object imaginable.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Hand That Rocks the Mabel
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel discover their seemingly cherubic new neighbour, Lil' Gideon, happens to be the town's adored psychic. But when Dipper convinces Mabel to go on a date with Gideon to question his authenticity, she soon learns that his cuteness can fade.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Gideon Rises
programme.desc: After Li'l Gideon takes over the Mystery Shack, Dipper and Mabel try to defeat him and win back their home. Unfortunately, Li'l Gideon is always one step ahead. Dipper and Mabel must face the fact that their summer in Gravity Falls is coming to an end.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Legend of the Gobblewonker
programme.desc: The twins embark on a mission to prove that a legendary sea monster exists at the bottom of the local lake. Soos helps them on a boating mission to prove it exists.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Stanchurian Candidate
programme.desc: When Grunkle Stan decides to run for mayor, Dipper and Mabel have their work cut out for them trying to turn their gaffe-prone uncle into the perfect candidate.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: The Present
programme.desc: When Hiro finds a wrapped present in the closet, he assumes it's from Aunt Cass and takes it in order to figure out what it is. However, after a mix-up, the present becomes lost and Hiro enlists the Big Hero 6 team to track it down.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: I Was a Middle Aged Robot/ Suddenly Suzy
programme.desc: Candace is determined to win this year's father-daughter obstacle course, but unfortunately, Lawrence finds Agent P's lair and his memory is accidentally erased by a gadget.

programme.title: Amphibia: Quarreler's Pass/ Toadcatcher
programme.desc: Hop Pop drops Sprig and Polly off at an obstacle-filled mountain trail designed to help them get along. Sasha and Grime must reconcile their differences to escape Newtopia's most skilled warrior, General Yunnan.

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne Theft Auto / Breakout Star
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne or Beast?/ Best Fronds
programme.desc: Sprig tries to capture a mysterious beast to prove that he's responsible; Sprig takes Anne swimming in a nearby lake to help her feel less homesick.

programme.title: Amphibia: Civil Wart/ Hop-Popular
programme.desc: Anne exposes Wartwood to a teen romance film, and the town is split on the movie's love triangle. After losing his stand, Hop Pop decides to run for mayor of Wartwood.

programme.title: Amphibia: Handy Anne/ Fort in the Road
programme.desc: Worried that something bad could happen while they are in Newtopia, Anne decides to disaster-proof the farm. Later, Sprig longs for exotic road trip adventures, but Hop Pop's strict road rules threaten to spoil all of his fun plans.

programme.title: Amphibia: A Night at the Inn/ Wally and Anne
programme.desc: The Plantars stay at an inn for a night, but Polly discovers the caretakers aren’t what they seem. Everyone calls Anne crazy when she claims to have seen the Moss Man.

programme.title: Amphibia: Swamp and Sensibility/ Wax Museum
programme.desc: When Anne discovers an old friend who has been living a double life, she becomes fixated on helping him be his true self. The family visits a mysterious roadside oddities museum where every treasure comes with a price.

programme.title: Amphibia: Truck Stop Polly/ A Caravan Named Desire
programme.desc: Feeling unappreciated by her family, Polly hatches a plan to make them pay attention to her. Hop Pop signs the family up to join a traveling theater troupe, hoping to realize his dream of being an actor.

programme.title: Amphibia: Cane Crazy / Flood, Sweat & Tears
programme.desc: When Anne breaks Hop Pop's favorite cane, she and her friends set out to replace it; After Anne's bedroom floods she has to share a room with Sprig.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Ballad of Hopediah Plantar/ Anne Hunter
programme.desc: Hop Pop's efforts to be hailed as a hero amongst some small-town folks backfires when he stands up to the wrong family. Then, when the family is in danger, Anne must put her self-consciousness aside in order to learn the true way of the hunter.

programme.title: Amphibia: Cursed!/ Fiddle Me This
programme.desc: After Anne helps Sprig break up with Maddie, strange things start happening to them. When a popular talent competition comes to Wartwood, Hop Pop goes overboard in training Sprig to win.

programme.title: Amphibia: Contagi-Anne/ Family Shrub
programme.desc: Anne fakes getting sick to get off work, but the rest of the family gets sick. Sprig and Polly think their family history is boring, until they uncover family secrets.

programme.title: Amphibia: Dating Season / Anne vs. Wild
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Amphibia: Scavenger Hunt/ The Plantars Check In
programme.desc: Anne, Sprig and Marcy receive a mysterious message from the king of Newtopia that sends them on a puzzle-solving mission. Anne finally meets with King Andrias and tries to enlist his help in getting back home.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise: Shining Bright! Hyper-Flux!
Beyblade Burst Rise: Invasion! The New King!
Don't Ever Give Up
programme.desc: Relive Jim Valvano's inspirational speech from the 1993 ESPYS, shortly before he died of cancer, and the memorable speeches since.

programme.desc: An exclusive look inside Washington quarterback Alex Smith's recovery from a 2018 leg injury that nearly cost him his life. Smith opens up about flesh-eating bacteria, limb salvage measures and what it was like to throw a football again.

programme.title: Backstory: Serena vs. The Umpire

programme.title: Backstory: The Decision

programme.desc: A former high school basketball prodigy accepts a coaching job for a chance at redemption.

programme.title: Movie: Baby God
programme.desc: The children of a fertility doctor who spent decades secretly using his own sperm to inseminate patients reckon with their identities.

programme.title: The Undoing
programme.desc: Haley walks an ethical tightrope in her defense strategy. As the courtroom theater mounts, Grace takes measures to protect herself and her family.

programme.title: Murder on Middle Beach
programme.desc: A documentarian tries to solve the mystery of his mother's murder.

programme.title: Between the World and Me
programme.desc: First published in 2015, 'Between the World and Me' was written by Ta-Nehisi Coates’ to his teenage son, and recounts the author’s experiences growing up in Baltimore’s inner city and the fear of violence against the Black community.

programme.title: Movie: Birds of Prey: And the Fantabulous Emancipation of One Harley Quinn
programme.desc: After being thrown out by the Joker, Harley Quinn finds herself teaming up with the superheroes The Huntress and Black Canary and police detective Renee Montoya to destroy a criminal empire and rescue a young pickpocket with a bounty on her head.

programme.title: Movie: The Beguiled
programme.desc: A wounded Union soldier finds refuge in a women-only seminary whose residents agree to nurse him back to health. Despite the Confederate soldiers looking for him, it's his presence and actions with the women that are the true dangers to his life.

programme.title: Movie: Lying and Stealing
programme.desc: A talented art thief named Ivan wants out of the business when he meets aspiring actress Elyse. Her own past and substantial debt draw her to him, and she decides to help him wrap up his last few jobs.

programme.title: Movie: Harry and the Hendersons
programme.desc: While on a camping trip, a hunter brings home a seven-foot-tall Sasquatch named Harry.

programme.title: Well Groomed
programme.desc: Spend a year amid the world of creative dog groomers.

programme.title: Movie: Daylight
programme.desc: An ex-emergency chief must help people escape from a tunnel collapse in New Jersey.

programme.title: Movie: Grudge Match
programme.desc: Thirty years ago a boxer retired suddenly before a defining third match against his main rival. Now, both boxers are tempted back to the ring, and the grudge match becomes a television special.

programme.title: Movie: Hero
programme.desc: After man unexpectedly defeats the enemies of an ancient Chinese ruler, he is summoned to the ruler's palace to tell the story of his victory.

programme.title: Movie: Crazy, Not Insane
programme.desc: Learn about the work of Dr. Dorothy Otnow Lewis, a psychiatrist who examined the psychology of killers.

programme.title: Shameless: Be a Good Boy. Come for Grandma.
programme.desc: Fiona, now living with Sean, attempts to get his son, Will, to like her. He starts to come around, but when Will snags one of Carl's guns at the Gallagher house, Sean catches him and is furious with Fiona, worried he'll lose custody.

programme.title: Shameless: A Yurt of One's Own
programme.desc: Fiona tries to make amends with Sean, who isn't giving her the time of day. Meanwhile, Debbie and Queenie travel to a rural commune along with Frank who is trying to escape G-Doggg, who's after him for stealing his drugs.

programme.title: Shameless: Paradise Lost
programme.desc: Sean officially moves into the Gallagher house as Fiona, intent on getting her marriage right this time, sets out to plan a traditional wedding. Meanwhile, Kev is not happy about V and Svetlana's pending green card marriage and seeks a way around it.

programme.title: Shameless: Sleep No More
programme.desc: Frank offers to pay for the reception, then goes scamming around town to raise the money. Sean worries Frank will only end up hurting Fiona and confronts him. Their difference of opinion quickly descends into a brawl.

programme.title: Shameless: Familia Supra Gallegorious Omnia!
programme.desc: It's wedding day and Debbie shows up at the church with Franny. Ian finally brings Caleb to meet the family. Frank shows up uninvited -- and high -- and reveals that Sean is still a practicing junkie.

programme.title: Movie: Hitch
programme.desc: While helping his latest client, a professional 'date doctor' falls for a journalist.

programme.title: Movie: Home for the Holidays
programme.desc: A down-on-her-luck single mom flies home to spend Thanksgiving with her eccentric family.

programme.title: Movie: The Switch
programme.desc: Seven years after becoming artificially inseminated, a woman learns that her best friend switched the donor sample with his own.

programme.title: Movie: The Queens of Comedy
programme.desc: Four female stand up comedians strut their stuff at the Orpheum Theatre in Memphis.

programme.title: Inside the NFL: 2020 Week 12
programme.desc: Presents exclusive NFL highlights of every football game from the previous week.

programme.title: Movie: Hitch
programme.desc: While helping his latest client, a professional 'date doctor' falls for a journalist.

programme.title: Movie: National Treasure
programme.desc: Fortune hunters search for a treasure using clues found in the Declaration of Independence.

programme.title: Shameless: Hiraeth
programme.desc: Frank wakes up after a month-long coma to find no one missed him. Worried she isn't a good mother, Debbie takes a criminal approach to making sure Franny grows up wealthy. Lip successfully completes rehab and is determined to stay sober.

programme.title: Shameless: Swipe, F**k, Leave
programme.desc: Ready to disown his family, Frank takes Liam under his wing and starts a new life barricaded on the top floor of the Gallagher home. Fiona, meanwhile, adopts a new, relaxed attitude, and starts running Patsy's Pies on her own terms.

programme.title: Shameless: Home Sweet Homeless Shelter
programme.desc: Kevin, Veronica and Svetlana start a topless maid service. At the shelter, meanwhile, Frank makes new friends to replace his old family -- leading them to a for-sale house converted into the Gallagher Home for the Homeless.

programme.title: Shameless: I Am a Storm
programme.desc: Frank worries that he and his new family will lose their Home for the Homeless shelter, so he plans a little goodwill for the neighborhood. Meanwhile, Fiona drums up business by throwing a speakeasy party at Patsy's Pies.

programme.title: Shameless: Own Your Sh*t
programme.desc: Frank learns that a billionaire philanthropist has bought the homeless shelter and he and his clan can stay. Meanwhile, Fiona gets smart financial advice from a Tinder hookup as Ian struggles with his feelings for Trevor.

programme.title: Shameless: The Defenestration of Frank
programme.desc: Fiona sees opportunity in a laundromat for sale and decides to invest. Frank revels in the good fortune of his scam, but the troops catch a whiff of foul play. Meanwhile, Kev and V discover a shocking secret about Svetlana's father.

programme.title: Shameless: You'll Never Ever Get a Chicken in Your Whole Entire Life
programme.desc: Fiona learns that owning a laundromat is costlier than expected. Frank helps Liam get into a plush new school after his old one is permanently shut down. Meanwhile, Debbie cleans up her act and grows closer to Neil.

programme.title: Movie: That's My Boy
programme.desc: After fathering a son as a teenager, a man resurfaces just before his now grown son's wedding.

programme.desc: Godzilla rises from the ocean's depths and destroys everything in its path, including NYC.

programme.title: Movie: Elf

programme.title: Movie: Deep Impact
programme.desc: As a comet is on a collision course with earth, humans have to prepare for their survival. They randomly select eight hundred thousand people to be saved in order to keep the human race alive.

programme.title: Movie: Oculus
programme.desc: Seeking to exonerate her brother, a young woman tracks down a mysterious antique mirror that she believes is responsible for the brutal deaths of her parents ten years prior.

programme.title: Movie: The Grudge
programme.desc: An American nurse in Japan finds herself working in a house which holds a terrible secret.

programme.title: Movie: Robin Hood

programme.desc: A man who has been raised in the North Pole as an elf travels to New York City to find his true father.

programme.title: Movie: Hoffa
programme.desc: The story of Jimmy Hoffa and the history of the nation's most powerful labour union.

programme.title: Movie: End of Sentence
programme.desc: After being released from prison, a young man reluctantly embarks on a journey with his estranged father to spread his mother's ashes in her native Ireland.

programme.title: Movie: From Hell
programme.desc: A serial killer haunts the streets of 1888 London. Two inspectors attempt to solve the brutal dissections of the city's people. One inspector falls for a prostitute and attempts to solve the case before she becomes one of the victims.

programme.title: Movie: A Blue Ridge Mountain Christmas

programme.title: Movie: Christmas at Grand Valley
programme.desc: An artist returns home to Grand Valley just in time for Christmas. While there, she meets a single-dad and they soon find their worlds colliding.

programme.title: Movie: Home for Christmas Day

programme.title: Movie: A Christmas Love Story
programme.desc: A youth-choir director is tasked with writing the title song for her Christmas Eve show but becomes distracted when a gifted boy joins the choir. Unbeknownst to her, this boy does not tell his widowed father of his plans to sing in the service.

programme.title: Movie: The Christmas Ring

programme.title: Movie: The Angel Tree

programme.title: Movie: Time for You to Come Home for Christmas
